content:
Overwatch Anran Redesign: Blizzard Finally Reveals Updated Face After Massive Fan Backlash

Published April 7, 2026 | Updated with Season 2 release details

Breaking News: Blizzard has officially revealed Anran's redesigned character model for Overwatch Season 2, launching April 14, 2026. The changes address months of criticism about "same face syndrome" and include a more defined jawline, sharper features, and confident posture that better matches her "fierce older sister" personality.

In a remarkable turn of events that shows the power of community feedback, Blizzard Entertainment has revealed Anran's updated face model ahead of Overwatch Season 2's launch . Game Director Aaron Keller posted a video on the game's social media channels sharing the updated version, with changes set to go live when Season 2 launches on April 14th .

This redesign comes just two months after Anran was officially added to the roster on February 10, 2026, with the launch of Season 1: Conquest, as Overwatch officially ditched the "2" from its title . The rapid turnaround represents an unprecedented response from Blizzard to player criticism.

But what sparked this controversy in the first place? And what exactly did Blizzard change? Let's dive deep into one of 2026's most talked-about gaming controversies and its surprising resolution.

Table of Contents

  1. What Happened: The Anran Controversy Explained
  2. Voice Actor Fareeha Andersen Speaks Out
  3. Blizzard's Response and Redesign Commitment
  4. The New Design: What Actually Changed
  5. Understanding 'Same Face Syndrome' in Overwatch
  6. Community Reaction: Did Blizzard Get It Right?
  7. Season 2 Launch Details and What's Next
  8. Why This Redesign Matters for Gaming

What Happened: The Anran Controversy Explained

Anran was officially added to the roster on Tuesday, February 10, with the launch of Season 1: Conquest. Players expressed excitement over the character based on concept art, a promotional comic, and an animated short shared by developer Blizzard, released in August of last year .

The Promise vs. Reality

Anran was first introduced back in 2025 as part of Wuyang's animated short and adjoining comic, Against the Tide. At this point, she was the supportive but fierce older sister to Wuyang and a terrifying fighter in her own right. She had a distinctive look that set her apart from many of the other heroes in Overwatch .

The animated version featured:

  • A longer nose, angled eyebrows and a more pointed chin
  • Sharper, more angular facial features
  • A mature, confident appearance befitting an older sister character
  • Distinctive Chinese features that made her stand out

The In-Game Disappointment

However, the version of Anran revealed in 3D form has a much rounder, softer face, with chubbier cheeks and an overall younger, traditionally 'prettier' look . When Anran's in-game model was revealed to have a much cuter face than her animated form, resembling existing heroes like Juno or Kiriko, fans criticised the "same face" design .

Community Outrage: Within hours of Anran's reveal, social media erupted with side-by-side comparisons showing how drastically different she looked from her animated appearance. Fans across multiple languages expressed disappointment, with some calling it "lazy" character design.

The criticisms around Anran, a character of Chinese nationality, revolved around what fans call the "same face syndrome," pointing out that character design in Overwatch, especially for East Asian women characters, has gotten homogeneous .

Voice Actor Fareeha Andersen Speaks Out

In an unprecedented move, Anran's voice actor, Fareeha, joined in calls to redesign Anran to better match her earlier appearance as Wuyang's older sister . This moment became a turning point in the controversy.

The "Unspoken Promise" Broken

Andersen said in a video: "I got to mourn Anran between the design I had hoped for her and the design we ended up with. Because I think in her comic and the cinematic Elemental Kin, there was a precedent set by it. There was an unspoken promise that said, 'We are going to challenge the beauty standards plaguing, ransacking media these days,' right? The Ozempic-chic, the 'contour your nose, you have no nose, the tiniest nose'" .

Anderson said Anran looked "more docile than the most peacekeeping support in the game" , despite being a fire-wielding damage dealer with a fierce personality.

A Call for Change With Grace

Andersen shared the community's concerns with the Blizzard team, and encouraged others to do so as well with "boldness and kindness" . Her balanced approach—criticizing the design while acknowledging the developers' hard work—set the tone for constructive community feedback.

Pro Tip: Want to make your voice heard on gaming issues? Follow Fareeha's example: be specific about what's wrong, explain why it matters, but remain respectful. Developers are more likely to respond to constructive criticism than hate comments.

Blizzard's Response and Redesign Commitment

Game director Aaron Keller said: "The team is currently discussing what it'd take to make Anran look and feel more like the fierce older sister that we all envisioned her to be. We're so proud of the work that our team has put into Anran and the rest of the five heroes launching in season 1, and we agree that she can be even better if we get this aspect of her right in game" .

The Technical Challenge

Keller explained: "Our hero models are incredibly complicated, and we really need to test out what we can do" . This wasn't just an excuse—Overwatch's character models include:

  • Complex rigging for animations and facial expressions
  • Multiple skin variations that all need to work with the base model
  • First-person and third-person viewing considerations
  • Performance optimization across platforms
  • Hitbox consistency for competitive balance

The Promise Delivered

The director added that the team was hoping to make an update to her design at some point during season 1 . Fast forward to April 2026, and Blizzard has delivered on that promise ahead of Season 2's launch.

Looking for ways to earn rewards for Overwatch cosmetics? Check out our guide on how to earn GCash to fund your gaming purchases, or explore our gaming deals section for the best offers.

The New Design: What Actually Changed

Game director Aaron Keller posted a video on the game's social media channels to share the updated version of her face, explaining: "We want our heroes to feel unique, but we also want their visuals to match their personalities, and we feel like we didn't quite land that when Anran first released. We think she could come across older and that her original version was too innocent and playful" .

Specific Visual Changes

The changes include a more defined jawline and cheek bones, and move the design away from the round "babyface" of her original design . One of the most noticeable updates is a "more focused look" in her eyes. She was also given darker shading around them, along with more freckles, defined cheeks and jaw, as well as raised eyebrows .

Feature Original Design Redesigned Version
Face Shape Round, soft, youthful Angular, defined jawline
Eyes Large, innocent expression More focused, darker shading
Eyebrows Curved, gentle Raised, sharper angle
Cheeks Fuller, rounder More defined, with freckles
Overall Impression Cute, playful, younger sister Fierce, confident, older sister

Beyond the Face: Posture Changes

The team also changed a few parts of her visual presentation, including giving her a more upright, "confident" pose in the hero select screen . Anran's character model also has a different posture now, appearing more confident and ready to take her enemies on in the hero selection menu .

Character Design Insight: Body language and posture are just as important as facial features in conveying personality. Anran's new confident stance reinforces her role as a natural-born leader and fierce protector.

Understanding 'Same Face Syndrome' in Overwatch

Overwatch's character design has gotten a bit homogeneous over the years. Specifically, the women of Blizzard's hero shooter have suffered from "same face syndrome" for years, with characters like Widowmaker, Ashe, and Freja being nearly identical in some skins. However, it's gotten especially bad for the game's East Asian heroes since Kiriko came onto the scene in 2022 .

What Is Same Face Syndrome?

Same-face syndrome describes the phenomenon where multiple female heroes share nearly identical facial features, making them look like the same character with different hairstyles and outfits . Social media was full of posts saying that Anran's face looks like a copy and paste of the existing Overwatch characters Kiriko and Juno. Many fans see her as a severe example of a trend that's been dubbed "same-face syndrome" .

The Technical Explanation

Senior Producer Kenny Hudson shared that it's partly due to technical reasons: "Something that we kind of look into when we're doing our heroes is how can we make them unique, but still give them a good platform, proportionally, height, scale proportion to not only build cosmetics for them and future-proof things, but to stop the technical hurdles of other things. So, one of the things that really helps with that is if you give longer limbs, taller legs, a bigger core, it actually makes it easier for our artists to physically put new geometry on those models" .

Other Games Face This Too

League of Legends is a prime example. With over 170 champions, fans have long complained about the "same face syndrome." Even as Riot Games reworks older champions and releases new ones, the issue persists .

Important: While technical limitations exist, they shouldn't become an excuse for homogeneous character design, especially in a game that prides itself on diversity and representation.

Community Reaction: Did Blizzard Get It Right?

A lot of players have thanked the devs for being willing to listen and changing her features, as well as praised them for their effort . The response has been largely positive, with most fans appreciating Blizzard's willingness to act on feedback.

Positive Fan Responses

One user wrote: "I'm ngl, I thought they were gonna make her look awful or smth lol. I'll admit it, I was wrong. This actually looks pretty good" . This sentiment was echoed across social media platforms.

What Fans Are Saying

  • Recognition of effort: Players appreciate that Blizzard listened and acted quickly
  • Visual improvements: The changes genuinely make Anran look more distinctive
  • Character consistency: The new design better matches her personality and lore
  • Hope for the future: This sets a precedent for addressing similar issues

Some Concerns Remain

From this angle, however, it still doesn't look like her nose is as big as it was in early representations of the character. Maybe that will be more apparent at different angles . Some fans note that while improved, the redesign may not fully capture every aspect of her original cinematic appearance.

For more gaming news and updates, check out our coverage of Mobile Legends and other popular titles in the Philippines.

Season 2 Launch Details and What's Next

We'll see how fans react to it when it finally comes to the game at the beginning of season 2, which starts on April 14 . Season 2 begins on April 14 , giving players just one week to experience Anran's new look.

What to Expect in Season 2

Anran was one of the five new Heroes added with Overwatch's big soft relaunch back in February, where Blizzard dropped the 2 from the game's name, recommitted themselves to the series' rich lore and story, and promised that a total of 10 new Heroes would be coming this year alone. She joined the roster alongside fellow DPS Emre, Tank Hero Domina, and Support Heroes Mizuki and Jetpack Cat .

  • Anran's redesigned model goes live
  • New seasonal content and cosmetics
  • Balance changes based on Season 1 data
  • Blizzard recently revealed the design for the next Hero joining Overwatch as a tease ahead of a full showcase on April 8th

How to Access Season 2

Season 2 is a free update for all Overwatch players. Simply log in after April 14, 2026, and you'll automatically have access to all the new content, including Anran's updated appearance.

Mark Your Calendar: April 14, 2026 - Overwatch Season 2 launches with Anran's redesigned face model. Make sure your game is updated before jumping in!

Why This Redesign Matters for Gaming

Many are taking the Anran announcement as a positive sign that Blizzard is willing to listen to community feedback, taking a step towards restoring Overwatch to its former glory . This case study offers important lessons for the entire gaming industry.

The Power of Constructive Feedback

The Anran redesign demonstrates that:

  1. Player voices matter: When communities provide specific, constructive feedback, developers can act on it
  2. Representation is important: Players want to see authentic, diverse character designs that reflect real people
  3. Quick responses build trust: Blizzard's relatively fast turnaround (2 months) shows commitment
  4. Transparency works: Being honest about technical challenges while committing to change builds goodwill

Setting a Precedent

GameSpot reported, fans are hopeful that the commitment to update Anran reflects a broader openness to community input, potentially restoring some of the goodwill that made Overwatch a standout in the hero shooter genre. Some see this moment as an opportunity for Blizzard to reaffirm its reputation as a trailblazer, not just in gameplay, but in challenging the norms of character design and representation .

Beyond Overwatch

This situation sends a message to all game developers:

  • Beauty standards in gaming deserve critical examination
  • East Asian female characters shouldn't be subjected to "same face syndrome"
  • Character designs should match personality and lore, not just market trends
  • Technical limitations shouldn't override artistic vision and representation
Looking Ahead: The real test will be whether Blizzard applies these lessons to future heroes. Will the next five heroes launching in 2026 show more facial diversity? The community will be watching closely.

Final Thoughts: A Victory for Community-Driven Design

The Anran redesign represents more than just a few tweaks to a character model—it's a testament to the power of community feedback when delivered constructively. Game director Aaron Keller said: "We want our heroes to feel unique, but also want their visuals to match their personality, and we feel like we didn't quite land that when Anran first released. We think she can come across older and that her original version was too innocent and playful" .

By April 14, 2026, Overwatch players will finally see the Anran that was promised—a fierce, confident, natural-born leader whose appearance matches her fiery personality. This case proves that when developers and communities work together respectfully, everyone wins.

For more information about the redesign, visit the official Overwatch website or check out Polygon's ongoing coverage of Overwatch Season 2.

Genshin Impact 6.5 (Luna VI) Complete Guide: Linnea Banner, Free Primogems & Dornman Port Release

Published April 6, 2026 | Updated for Philippine Servers

TL;DR: Genshin Impact Version 6.5 "Luna VI" launches April 8, 2026 at 11:00 AM PHT (Philippine Time). F2P players can earn approximately 10,000-11,880 Primogems (about 77 pulls). New 5-star Geo Bow character Linnea debuts alongside two new Mondstadt areas: Dornman Port and Temple of Space. Maintenance starts April 7 at 6:00 PM PHT and gives 300 free Primogems compensation.

With just two days until launch, HoYoverse's latest Genshin Impact update is generating massive hype across the Filipino gaming community. Version 6.5 "Luna VI: Augured Homecoming" brings the Traveler back to Mondstadt with story-heavy content, a meta-shifting support character, and the most generous Primogem rewards in recent patches.

Whether you're a Day 1 player or returning after a break, this complete guide breaks down everything you need to maximize your pulls, plan your banner strategy, and explore every corner of the new content—all optimized for Filipino gamers.

  1. Version 6.5 Release Date & Server Maintenance Schedule
  2. Linnea: New 5-Star Geo Support Character Guide
  3. Complete Banner Schedule: Phase 1 & Phase 2 Breakdown
  4. How to Get 10,000+ Free Primogems in Version 6.5
  5. Dornman Port & Temple of Space: New Map Exploration
  6. Limited Events, Story Quests & Boss Battles

  8. Frequently Asked Questions

Version 6.5 Release Date & Server Maintenance Schedule

Genshin Impact Version 6.5 "Luna VI" releases on April 8, 2026, with maintenance starting the day before on April 7 . Here's the complete schedule for Filipino players:

Event Philippine Time (UTC+8) Duration
Maintenance Start April 7, 2026 - 6:00 PM ~5 hours
Version 6.5 Launch April 8, 2026 - 11:00 AM -
Maintenance Compensation After launch 300 Primogems
Version End Date May 19, 2026 42 days total
Pre-Installation Available: Pre-load became available a couple of days before the release, allowing you to install most of the new content in advance . Check your launcher or in-game settings to download early and jump in immediately when servers go live.

What Happens During Maintenance?

All players who have reached Adventure Rank 5 before the update begins will be given 300 Primogems as compensation . Make sure to claim this from your in-game mailbox after the update—it's essentially free pulls toward your next 5-star!

Looking for ways to earn more gaming rewards while waiting? Check out our guide on how to earn GCash playing mobile games to fund your Genesis Crystal purchases.

Linnea: New 5-Star Geo Support Character Guide

Linnea, the new 5-star Geo character, enables the Lunar Crystallize reaction for Geo teams, making her the single most important character for all Geo DPS units in the game . She's not just another support—she's the missing piece that completes the Lunar-Crystallize meta introduced in previous Nod-Krai updates.

Why Linnea Matters for Your Account

Linnea is a 5-star Geo Bow character and the only brand-new unit arriving in Luna VI. Based on what we know so far, she is a Geo support with off-field utility and healing, which makes her good for anyone looking to build the best Zibai team .

Key features of Linnea's kit:

  • Geo Resistance Reduction: Shreds enemy defenses for massive DPS gains
  • Off-field Healing: Defense-scaling heal keeps your team alive
  • Lunar-Crystallize Enabler: Unlocks new reaction-based team compositions
  • Adventurers' Guild Advisor: Brings unique exploration mechanics

Linnea's Signature Weapon & Ascension Materials

The new 5-Star Bow weapon, Golden Frostbound Oath will release at the same time as Linnea in Version 6.5 Luna VI Phase 1 . This weapon is specifically designed to maximize her support capabilities.

The new field boss, Watcher: Fallen Vigil, will release in Version 6.5 Luna VI. The new boss will likely have the boss drops for Linnea . You can find this boss near Dornman Port after the update goes live.

Pull Strategy Alert: Version 6.5 introduces only one new character — but that character is Linnea, the linchpin that completes the Lunar-Crystallize meta. For players who have invested in Zibai, Linnea is effectively a must-pull .

Complete Banner Schedule: Phase 1 & Phase 2 Breakdown

Version 6.5 follows the standard two-phase banner structure. Here's the complete schedule with all featured characters:

Phase 1 Banners (April 8 - April 28, 2026)

Linnea's release banner is running alongside Chasca's rerun banner for Phase 1 of Version 6.5 Luna VI, from April 8, 2026 to April 28, 2026 .

Featured 5-Star Characters:

  • Linnea (NEW) - 5★ Geo Bow Support
  • Chasca (Rerun) - 5★ Anemo Bow Physical DPS

Featured 5-Star Weapon:

  • Golden Frostbound Oath (Linnea's signature bow)

Phase 2 Banners (April 28 - May 19, 2026)

Lauma and Nefer will have their rerun banners at the same time for Version 6.5 Luna VI Phase 2, running from April 28, 2026 to May 19, 2026 .

Featured 5-Star Characters:

  • Lauma (Rerun) - 5★ Dendro Catalyst Support
  • Nefer (Rerun) - 5★ Dendro Catalyst Main DPS

Special: Fontaine Chronicled Wish Banner

The livestream also announced the debut of the Fontaine Chronicled Banner to Genshin Impact, featuring Clorinde, Navia, Emilie, Lyney, and Sigewinne . This Chronicled Wish Banner is considered to be one of the best so far .

This special banner runs during Phase 2 and lets you select which 5-star character you want to target—perfect if you missed any Fontaine characters from previous versions.

Need help deciding which characters fit your team? Our gaming deals page also features Genesis Crystal bundles to help you reach pity faster.

How to Get 10,000+ Free Primogems in Version 6.5

Free-to-play players can expect to collect approximately 77 Intertwined Fates (around 10,000–11,000 Primogems) over the course of Version 6.5 . This is one of the most generous patches in recent memory, thanks to two major map expansions.

Complete Primogem Source Breakdown

Free-to-play players can obtain approximately 11,880 Primogems (74 pulls) in Version 6.5. This is the total amount obtainable from various permanent and limited rewards, including Daily Commissions, Spiral Abyss, Imaginary Theater, and events .

Bonus Primogems for Light Spenders

Purchasing the Blessing of the Welkin Moon grants an additional 3,780 Primogems, allowing for a total of 97 pulls. If the Battle Pass is also purchased, a total of 106 pulls are possible .

For Filipino players looking to maximize value, the Blessing of the Welkin Moon (₱149/month) offers the best Primogem-to-PHP ratio. Pair this with our guide on free rewards strategies for Filipino gamers to stretch your gaming budget.

Pity System Reminder: You're guaranteed a 5-star character every 90 pulls, with a 50/50 chance of getting the featured character. If you lose the 50/50, your next 5-star (within 90 pulls) is guaranteed to be the featured character. Plan your pulls accordingly!

Dornman Port & Temple of Space: New Map Exploration

The main focus during the livestream was undoubtedly on Dornman Port, a Mondstadt map expansion in Genshin Impact that has been teased for years. Players will not only be able to explore the northern edges of the Anemo Nation, but they will also be able to unlock a path to the Temple of Space, a domain built by Asmoday that functions as the update's second zone .

Dornman Port: Mondstadt's Commercial Hub

There will be a new area around the region of Mondstadt, which is the Dornman Port in Version 6.5. It acts as Mondstadt's primary port for its commercial trade for goods and items .

What to expect in Dornman Port:

  • Rich Lore Connections: Meet key NPCs tied to Mondstadt's history
  • Treasure Hunting: Dozens of chests containing Primogems and upgrade materials
  • Exploration Quests: World quests revealing secrets of the Knights of Favonius
  • New Enemy Types: Prepare your best teams for challenging encounters

Temple of Space: Asmoday's Domain

The Temple of Space is a hidden area located above Mondstadt. It acts as Asmoday's, the ruler of sky and space, own warehouse of personal collection of valuable items from every region in Teyvat .

The Temple of Space is also the area seen during the game's login screen, which further sets up Version 6.5 as the patch where things come full circle . This is a massive lore moment for longtime players—we're finally accessing the mysterious floating domain that's greeted us every time we log in.

Exploration Tip: Both new areas are packed with puzzles and hidden mechanisms. Bring characters with elemental sight abilities and consider using an interactive map to track all collectibles. Every chest counts toward your Primogem total!

Limited Events, Story Quests & Boss Battles

Specific events include: Surveying & Mapping Studies (April 10-20): Use a compass to locate clues on the map and mark their positions. Rapid Capture (May 6-18): Select specific characters based on Storyboarding Objectives, have them strike the required poses, and then take a photograph. Where Waves Meet the Reef (April 27-May 14): Participate in a Tower Defense mini-game to earn rewards, with a chance to obtain free Jahoda .

Flagship Event: Where Waves Meet the Reef

The flagship event, Where Waves Meet the Reef, for 6.5 providing players with a free copy of Jahoda . This tower defense-style event is perfect for players who love strategic combat and want to add a free character to their roster.

Linnea's Story Quest: Alcyon Chapter Act I

Version 6.5 introduces Linnea's new Story Quest, Alcyon Chapter: Act I. This quest centers around a competition known as the Spirit Envoy Championship, which both you and Linnea are set to take part in, alongside some other familiar faces. This contest sees animal companions competing against each other to see who's the strongest partner, putting your teamwork to the test .

New World Boss: Watcher - Fallen Vigil

The Genshin Impact 6.5 introduces a new boss called Watcher: Fallen Vigil. This fearsome foe is a shadow construxt born from the overflow of the mighty primordial being, and was previously stationed in The Temple of Space, where it acts as a guard. It's now hiding in the wilderness outside Dornman Port, where it uses its space-related abilities to attack any opponents who challenge it .

F2P Pull Strategy: Who Should You Wish For?

With limited Primogems and multiple tempting banners, Filipino F2P players need a smart strategy. Here's our expert recommendation based on account progression:

Priority 1: Pull for Linnea If...

  • You own Zibai or other Geo main DPS characters
  • You're building toward Lunar-Crystallize teams
  • You need a versatile support with healing capabilities
  • You want to future-proof your account for upcoming Geo characters

For those eyeing Lunar-Bloom, the simultaneous rerun of Lauma and Nefer is a rare and efficient opportunity not to be missed. And if you missed key Fontaine characters, the Chronicled Wish banner adds another reason to spend wisely this patch .

Priority 2: Save Your Primogems If...

Version 6.6 is shaping up to be the core update for the Hexerei meta. Nicole, a 5-star Pyro Sword character expected to be Varka's ideal partner, is slated to make her debut, with a Durin rerun also teased .

If you're not invested in Geo teams, it might be smarter to save for Version 6.6's anticipated meta-defining characters.

Weapon Banner Considerations

The Golden Frostbound Oath is a strong weapon, but weapon banners are typically not F2P-friendly. Only pull if:

  • You've already secured Linnea
  • You have enough Primogems for both featured weapons
  • You're willing to spend money to reach weapon pity (240 wishes worst case)
Banner Math for Filipino Players: At current Genesis Crystal prices (₱549 for 3,280 crystals), reaching hard pity for a character costs approximately ₱5,000-₱6,000 PHP. The Blessing of Welkin Moon (₱149/month) + smart Primogem farming is far more cost-effective for most players.

Frequently Asked Questions

What time does Genshin Impact 6.5 release in the Philippines?

Genshin Impact Version 6.5 releases on April 8, 2026 at 11:00 AM Philippine Time (UTC+8). Maintenance begins April 7 at 6:00 PM PHT and lasts approximately 5 hours. All players receive 300 Primogems as maintenance compensation.

Is Linnea worth pulling for F2P players?

Linnea is a must-pull if you own Zibai or plan to build Lunar-Crystallize teams. She's the only new character in 6.5 and completes the Geo support meta. However, if you don't use Geo characters, you can safely skip her and save for Version 6.6's Nicole and upcoming Pyro units.

How many Primogems can F2P players earn in Version 6.5?

Free-to-play players can earn approximately 10,000-11,880 Primogems (about 65-74 wishes) throughout Version 6.5's 42-day duration. This comes from daily commissions, new map exploration, limited events, Spiral Abyss, Imaginarium Theater, story quests, and maintenance compensation. Players with Welkin Moon can get up to 97 pulls total.

What are the new areas in Genshin Impact 6.5?

Version 6.5 adds two major map expansions: Dornman Port (Mondstadt's commercial trading hub) and the Temple of Space (Asmoday's domain above Mondstadt). Both areas feature exploration rewards, world quests, treasure chests, puzzles, and the new Watcher: Fallen Vigil boss needed to ascend Linnea.

When does the Fontaine Chronicled Wish banner run?

The Fontaine Chronicled Wish banner runs during Version 6.5 Phase 2 (April 28 - May 19, 2026) and features five 5-star characters: Clorinde, Navia, Emilie, Lyney, and Sigewinne. This special banner lets you select which character you want to target, making it ideal for players who missed Fontaine units in previous versions.

Final Thoughts: Make the Most of Version 6.5

With over 10,000 free Primogems available and two stunning new areas to explore, this update rewards both dedicated players and those returning after a break.

For Filipino gamers specifically, the timing couldn't be better. With schools entering summer break and the patch running through mid-May, you'll have plenty of time to complete every event, explore every corner of Dornman Port and the Temple of Space, and stockpile Primogems for future banners.

title: Elden Ring Movie Set Leak: First Look at A24's Epic Adaptation
metaTitle: Elden Ring Movie Set Leak Reveals Stunning Marika Statue | 2026
metaDescription: Viral TikTok footage reveals the first look at Alex Garland's Elden Ring movie set in England. See the game-accurate Queen Marika statue that has 2M+ views. Filming starts now!
excerpt: Leaked footage from England shows what appears to be the first glimpse of A24's highly anticipated Elden Ring movie, featuring a stunning recreation of the Church of Marika. The viral videos have accumulated over 2 million views across TikTok and Reddit, sending fans into a frenzy about Alex Garland's adaptation of FromSoftware's blockbuster game.
content:
Elden Ring Movie Set Leak: First Look at A24's Epic Adaptation Sends Fans Into Frenzy

Published April 6, 2026 | Gaming News

Breaking News: Cameras are supposed to start rolling on the Elden Ring movie next week , according to recent production reports. This leaked footage may be our first official glimpse at one of gaming's most ambitious film adaptations.

The gaming world exploded this week when footage appeared to have been recorded by a fan somewhere in the UK, originally posted to TikTok by user throxtv . What fans discovered has sent shockwaves through the Elden Ring community: a meticulously constructed film set featuring an unmistakable statue of Queen Marika, complete with gothic ruins that look like they were ripped straight from FromSoftware's critically acclaimed game.

The TikTok video has surpassed 2 million views, and the Reddit thread has generated over 5,000 comments as fans debate whether this is truly the set of Alex Garland's upcoming A24 adaptation or an elaborate fan project. Either way, the craftsmanship on display is breathtaking—and the implications are massive for one of the most anticipated video game movies in development.

Table of Contents

  1. What the Leaked Footage Reveals
  2. How the Gaming Community Reacted
  3. Everything We Know About the Elden Ring Movie
  4. Why Alex Garland is Perfect for This Adaptation
  5. When Will We See the Elden Ring Movie?
  6. Elden Ring's Massive Cultural Impact
  7. What Fans Can Expect from the Film
  8. Frequently Asked Questions

What the Leaked Footage Reveals About the Elden Ring Movie Set

The viral videos show a sweeping pan across a ruined stone structure with gothic arches, crumbling in elegant decay, framing an open landscape . At the center stands the most compelling evidence this is official: a robed female statue in the iconic cruciform pose of Queen Marika the Eternal, one of Elden Ring's most important lore figures.

The Church of Marika Recreation

A couple of videos, captured by Throxtv on TikTok, appears to reveal the set of Limgrave, including the infamous Church of Marika – complete with a statue inside . The level of detail is remarkable, with fans noting that the stonework, architectural style, and even the weathering effects match the in-game locations almost perfectly.

Key details spotted in the footage include:

  • Gothic stone arches in various states of decay
  • A central Queen Marika statue with arms extended in cruciform pose
  • Temporary construction fencing and equipment
  • Open field setting reminiscent of Limgrave from the game
  • Hedgehog Construction logo on construction work—the Surrey-based company is often hired to help with set assembly on television and movie projects

Evidence This Is the Real Deal

Several factors suggest this isn't just an elaborate fan creation. The footage looks to be captured at a real, physical location with stonework, surrounding landscape, and environmental details pretty consistent across frames, with no obvious signs of digital fabrication .

Production Update: Throxtv provided PC Gamer with a third video of the set that was taken earlier today by a friend, showing the church has been camouflaged by a tarp to protect it from photos, and has two people standing outside—presumably to stop anyone else from trying to take a peek . This increased security suggests official production measures.

The statue itself is particularly convincing. The pose, the robes, the fractured pedestal—it's Queen Marika. Whoever built this wanted viewers to make that connection . For Elden Ring players, Queen Marika is central to the game's mythology—she's the divine ruler who shattered the Elden Ring itself, triggering the catastrophic events that define the game's world.

How the Gaming Community Reacted to the Set Leak

The response has been electric. A TikTok clip allegedly showing a Church of Marika set has racked up 25,000 upvotes on Reddit , with fans dissecting every frame for clues about the movie's direction.

Fan Speculation and Analysis

Since being shared online, the videos have gone viral, racking up over two million views apiece at the time of writing, with fans of the FromSoftware RPG particularly impressed with how authentic everything looks .

The community discussion has focused on several key questions:

  • Timeline: The Church of Marika shown in the clip appears in a post-Shattering state, meaning broken and abandoned rather than intact, which points toward the movie being set after the Shattering event
  • Story Focus: Will it follow the Tarnished protagonist from the game, or explore other characters like Vyke?
  • Production Scale: The physical set construction suggests a commitment to practical effects over pure CGI
  • Authenticity: Fans are praising the game-accurate design choices

Some fans remain skeptical, wondering if this could be part of a marketing campaign for the upcoming Tarnished Edition of the game, or something else unrelated . However, the timing aligns perfectly with production schedules, and A24 has not issued any denials.

What Makes This So Exciting for Gamers

Elden Ring isn't just another video game—it's a cultural phenomenon. Elden Ring has sold 20 million units worldwide as of 2023 , and over 30 million units have shipped worldwide over the last few years . The game won over 300 Game of the Year awards and is considered one of the greatest games ever made.

For Filipino gamers especially, seeing this level of production quality brings hope that video game adaptations are finally getting the respect they deserve. If you're looking for more ways to enjoy gaming content, check out our guide on premium gaming deals in the Philippines.

Everything We Know About the Elden Ring Movie

A24 confirmed that Alex Garland will write and direct a live-action Elden Ring film for A24 and video game company Bandai Namco Entertainment Inc. in May 2025. Since then, details have been scarce—until now.

Confirmed Cast and Crew

Casting includes Kit Connor ("Heartstopper"), Ben Whishaw ("Skyfall"), and Cailee Spaeny ("Priscilla," "Alien: Romulus"), who are all said to have the three lead roles . The involvement of these talented actors signals that A24 is taking this project seriously.

Peter Rice is set to produce alongside Andrew Macdonald and Allon Reich from DNA, as well as George R. R. Martin and Vince Gerardis . Having the original worldbuilding author involved as a producer is a major win for authenticity.

How Alex Garland Made This Happen

This movie exists because of one man's obsession. Garland went to FromSoftware and Bandai Namco with his pitch, aggressively pursuing the A24-backed adaptation by writing a sprawling 160-page script — plus 40 pages of visuals — entirely on spec .

The Elden Ring movie was approved by Hidetaka Miyazaki himself, after director Alex Garland flew to Japan and presented him with a 160-page draft of his vision . That level of dedication from an acclaimed filmmaker shows this isn't a cash-grab—it's a passion project.

Director Credentials: Garland told IGN he was on his seventh playthrough of Elden Ring , proving he's intimately familiar with the source material. He even identified Malenia, Blade of Miquella, as the toughest boss—a choice any veteran player would respect.

Budget and Production Scale

The result is what might very well be the most expensive movie A24 has ever made . The leaked set footage supports this—the physical construction of a full Church of Marika with professional-grade stonework isn't cheap.

The choice to film in England makes practical sense. Filming appears to be taking place in the UK, as evidenced both by the scenery and the easily identifiable Hedgehog Construction logo . The UK's countryside provides natural locations that can double for the Lands Between, potentially saving millions in VFX costs.

Why Alex Garland is Perfect for This Adaptation

Alex Garland has built a reputation for thoughtful, visually stunning science fiction and horror. His filmography includes Ex Machina, Annihilation, Men, and Civil War—all films that explore dark themes with artistic integrity.

Garland's Filmmaking Style Matches Elden Ring's Tone

Elden Ring is known for its cryptic storytelling, atmospheric dread, and moments of sublime beauty amidst horror. Garland's previous work suggests he understands how to balance these elements:

  • Environmental Storytelling: Annihilation used alien landscapes to tell its story—similar to how Elden Ring's world reveals lore
  • Body Horror: Garland isn't afraid of disturbing imagery, essential for depicting Elden Ring's grotesque demigods
  • Philosophical Depth: His films explore identity, mortality, and transformation—themes central to Elden Ring
  • Visual Poetry: He knows how to create images that linger in your mind

Garland seems to be treating "Elden Ring" less like a commercial product and more like an artistic obsession. It's the kind of passion project he's betting his reputation on .

George R.R. Martin's Blessing

The Game of Thrones author, who created Elden Ring's backstory alongside Hidetaka Miyazaki, has expressed confidence in the adaptation. Martin took to his Not A Blog on May 30, saying, "A24 is a kickass studio, and Alex Garland is a first rate director" .

That endorsement matters. Martin knows both the source material intimately and the challenges of adapting fantasy for the screen. His involvement as a producer suggests he believes this team can pull it off.

Adaptation Challenges: Elden Ring's narrative is intentionally vague, told through item descriptions and environmental details. Garland will need to craft a coherent film narrative while maintaining the game's mysterious atmosphere—a difficult balance.

When Will We See the Elden Ring Movie?

Based on the leaked footage and recent reports, production is happening right now. Word this morning was that sets are being built, and cameras are supposed to start rolling on "Elden Ring" next week .

Estimated Release Timeline

If principal photography begins in April 2026, here's a realistic timeline:

Phase Timeframe Details
Principal Photography April - August 2026 4-5 months of filming in UK locations
Post-Production September 2026 - June 2027 VFX, sound design, editing for epic fantasy scale
Marketing Campaign Late 2027 Trailers, posters, promotional events
Theatrical Release Q4 2027 or Q1 2028 Most likely release window

According to current estimates, the picture is unlikely to be released before 2027 . Given the complexity of bringing Elden Ring's world to life, a 2027 or early 2028 release seems most realistic.

What Comes Next

A24 has remained silent on these leaks, neither confirming nor denying the footage's authenticity. A24 hasn't said a word since its initial announcement beyond the original May 2025 confirmation.

However, the addition of security measures— by the time a third video was captured, the Church of Marika had been covered with tarps and two guards were stationed nearby—presumably to prevent more leaked footage, suggesting whatever's being filmed is significant enough to warrant proper security measures —indicates official production is underway.

Elden Ring's Massive Cultural Impact

To understand why this movie matters, you need to understand Elden Ring's unprecedented success in gaming.

Sales and Player Numbers

Released in 2022 and co-created with George R. R. Martin, "Elden Ring" sold more than 30 million copies worldwide and was crowned Game of the Year . These numbers put it among the best-selling games of all time.

The game maintains an active community. On April 05, 2026, Elden Ring's player count peaked at 49,155 players, compared to the previous day's player count, this represented a 1.43% increase, with the daily player count ranging from 29,067 to 49,155 . That's remarkable longevity for a four-year-old single-player game.

ELDEN RING remains a well-played title in 2026, attracting approximately 952,523 users every month on Steam alone. Add PlayStation, Xbox, and other platforms, and the active player base is massive.

Critical Acclaim and Awards

Elden Ring received over 300 Game of the Year awards, including by the publications Ars Technica, Destructoid, EGM, Eurogamer, Game Informer, GamesRadar+, GameSpot, IGN, PC Gamer, and Polygon . This level of critical consensus is rare in gaming.

The game's DLC, Shadow of the Erdtree, was equally successful. Shadow of the Erdtree sold five million copies within three days of its release. In July 2025, FromSoftware announced that the DLC had sold over ten million copies .

Why Filipino Gamers Love Elden Ring

In the Philippines, Elden Ring has a dedicated following. The game's challenging-but-fair difficulty appeals to Filipino gamers who grew up on punishing classics. The online co-op features have created vibrant Filipino communities helping each other through tough boss fights.

For more gaming content tailored to Filipino players, check out our guides on free Mobile Legends diamonds and earning GCash through gaming.

What Fans Can Expect from the Elden Ring Movie

Based on the leaked footage and what we know about the production, several elements seem likely:

Story and Setting

The story follows the Tarnished, a group of outcasts summoned to the mystical Lands Between. Their mission is to reassemble the shattered Elden Ring, defeat a laundry list of grotesque demigods, and ascend to power as the new Elden Lord .

However, the Church of Marika set suggests the film might explore events during or after the Shattering—the catastrophic war triggered when Queen Marika destroyed the Elden Ring. This opens narrative possibilities beyond just retelling the game's player journey.

Visual Style and Tone

Expect a dark fantasy aesthetic with:

  • Practical Sets: The leaked footage shows A24 is building real locations, not relying solely on green screen
  • Gothic Architecture: Crumbling ruins, massive stone structures, and windswept landscapes
  • Body Horror: Elden Ring's demigods are grotesque, mutated beings—expect disturbing creature designs
  • Atmospheric Dread: Garland excels at creating tension and unease
  • Moments of Beauty: The game balances horror with sublime vistas; the film likely will too

How It Compares to Other Video Game Movies

Recent video game adaptations have seen mixed results. The Last of Us HBO series succeeded by focusing on character drama. Fallout on Amazon balanced humor and post-apocalyptic grit. The recent Super Mario films broke box office records with family-friendly adventure.

Elden Ring will likely chart its own path—closer to prestige fantasy like early Game of Thrones than popcorn entertainment. A24's track record with cerebral, artistic films suggests this won't be a typical blockbuster.

For Comparison: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie just opened to a massive $372.5 million globally, proving gaming movies can dominate theaters. But Elden Ring targets a very different audience—mature gamers who appreciate dark fantasy and complex storytelling.

Potential Challenges

Adapting Elden Ring presents unique difficulties:

  1. Cryptic Narrative: The game's story is intentionally vague and open to interpretation
  2. Gameplay Focus: Much of Elden Ring's appeal is the challenging combat—hard to translate to passive viewing
  3. Massive Lore: Condensing hundreds of hours of exploration into 2-3 hours of film
  4. Grotesque Imagery: The game's disturbing visuals might limit the film's theatrical audience
  5. Fan Expectations: With 30+ million players, everyone has their own Elden Ring experience

However, Garland's approach—writing a massive script with extensive visual references—suggests he's aware of these challenges and has a plan to address them.

How to Stay Updated on Elden Ring Movie News

As production continues, more leaks and official announcements are likely. Here's how to stay informed:

  • Follow Official Channels: Watch A24's social media and FromSoftware announcements
  • Reddit Communities: r/Eldenring breaks news fast and analyzes every detail
  • Gaming News Sites: IGN, Polygon, and PC Gamer have been covering the story closely
  • TikTok Creator: @throxtv originally posted the leaked footage and may share more
  • Smartly.Sale: We'll continue covering major developments—bookmark this page for updates

For more gaming news and deals, explore our coverage of Roblox in the Philippines and Free Fire redeem codes.

Final Thoughts: A Potentially Game-Changing Adaptation

The leaked Elden Ring movie set footage represents more than just early glimpses of a film—it's evidence that video game adaptations have entered a new era of artistic ambition and production quality.

FromSoftware's masterpiece deserves a film adaptation that honors its complexity, artistry, and dark vision. With Alex Garland's passion, A24's commitment to quality, and George R.R. Martin's involvement, this project has the right pieces in place.

The Church of Marika set shows they're taking authenticity seriously. The physical construction, the attention to architectural detail, the game-accurate statue—these aren't the hallmarks of a quick cash-grab. This is a team trying to bring the Lands Between to life with respect and craftsmanship.

Whether the film succeeds in capturing Elden Ring's magic remains to be seen. But for now, these leaked videos offer something rare: genuine hope that a beloved game is in good hands.

What do you think? Are you excited about the Elden Ring movie? Which aspect of the game's story should the film focus on? Share your thoughts with fellow Filipino gamers and stay tuned to Smartly.Sale for the latest gaming news and deals.

Frequently Asked Questions

When will the Elden Ring movie be released?

While no official release date has been announced, production is reportedly starting in April 2026. Based on typical film production timelines for VFX-heavy fantasy epics, the Elden Ring movie will likely release in late 2027 or early 2028. Post-production for a project of this scale typically takes 12-18 months after filming wraps.

Who is directing the Elden Ring movie?

Alex Garland (Ex Machina, Annihilation, Civil War) is writing and directing the Elden Ring movie for A24 and Bandai Namco. Garland personally pitched the project to FromSoftware's Hidetaka Miyazaki with a 160-page script written on spec, demonstrating his passion for the source material. He's also completed multiple playthroughs of the game.

Who is cast in the Elden Ring movie?

According to reports, Kit Connor (Heartstopper), Ben Whishaw (Skyfall), and Cailee Spaeny (Alien: Romulus, Civil War) are in talks for the three lead roles. No official casting announcements have been made by A24 or Bandai Namco yet, but these actors have been strongly linked to the project by industry insiders.

Is the leaked Elden Ring movie set footage real?

While A24 hasn't officially confirmed the footage, multiple factors suggest it's authentic: the presence of Hedgehog Construction equipment (a UK company specializing in film sets), professional-grade stonework and set dressing, increased security measures including tarps and guards, and timing that aligns with reported production schedules. The videos have over 2 million views across TikTok and Reddit.

Will George R.R. Martin be involved in the Elden Ring movie?

Yes, George R.R. Martin is listed as a producer on the Elden Ring film alongside Peter Rice, Andrew Macdonald, Allon Reich, and Vince Gerardis. Martin created the mythological backstory and worldbuilding for the original game in collaboration with Hidetaka Miyazaki. He has expressed confidence in A24 and director Alex Garland, calling them "kickass" and "first rate" respectively.

title: Super Mario Galaxy Movie Smashes $372M Box Office Record
metaTitle: Super Mario Galaxy Movie Breaks Box Office with $372M Global Opening
metaDescription: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie opens to record-breaking $372M globally, becoming 2026's biggest debut. Complete box office breakdown, cast details & what's next.
excerpt: Nintendo and Illumination's The Super Mario Galaxy Movie has delivered a cosmic box office performance, earning $372.5 million globally in its opening weekend. The sequel to 2023's billion-dollar hit proves the Mario franchise remains Hollywood's most powerful video game property.
content:
Super Mario Galaxy Movie Smashes $372M Box Office Record in Historic Opening Weekend

Published April 6, 2026 | Gaming News

Nintendo and Illumination have done it again. The Super Mario Galaxy Movie has delivered a $372.5M opening, the biggest worldwide debut for an MPA movie this year, proving that Mario's star power extends far beyond the Mushroom Kingdom and into the stratosphere of box office dominance.

For Filipino gamers and moviegoers who grew up playing Super Mario Galaxy on the Wii, seeing this beloved game come to life on the big screen represents more than just another animated film—it's a validation of gaming culture's mainstream appeal and Nintendo's continued relevance in 2026.

Key Takeaway: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie earned $190.1 million in the United States and Canada, and $182.4 million in other territories, for a worldwide total of $372.5 million in its opening five-day period from April 1-5, 2026.

Table of Contents

  1. Complete Box Office Breakdown: Numbers That Matter
  2. Every Box Office Record This Movie Shattered
  3. Star-Studded Voice Cast and Production Details
  4. International Performance: How Each Market Responded
  5. How It Compares to the 2023 Original
  6. What This Means for Nintendo's Movie Future
  7. Philippine Release and Local Impact
  8. Frequently Asked Questions

Complete Box Office Breakdown: Numbers That Matter

The sequel opened to an estimated $190.1 million domestically over the five-day Easter corridor, including a three-day weekend gross of $130.9 million , making it impossible to ignore even for casual moviegoers.

Opening Day Performance

The movie launched on a Wednesday (April 1, 2026), following the same strategy as its predecessor. The Super Mario Galaxy Movie ignited to $34.5 million from 3,821 theaters on opening day, marking the largest opening day of the year, above Amazon MGM's "Project Hail Mary" with $33.1 million and ranking above its predecessor, 2023's "The Super Mario Bros. Movie," which collected $31 million on its first day .

Day Domestic Gross International Gross
Wednesday (April 1) $34.5M $33.9M (78 markets)
Thursday (April 2) $24.6M $27.9M
Friday (April 3) $48.3M Est. $50M+
3-Day Weekend Total $130.9M -
5-Day Total $190.1M $182.4M

Production Budget and Profitability

Produced on a budget of $110 million, it is currently the third-highest-grossing film of 2026 and the highest-grossing animated film of the year . This represents a $10 million increase from the first movie's $100 million budget, primarily spent on enhanced space sequences and more complex character animations.

Filipino Perspective: At ₱60-70 billion pesos in production costs, this movie's budget exceeds the GDP of some Philippine provinces—yet it recouped its entire budget in just the opening day globally.

Every Box Office Record This Movie Shattered

The Super Mario Galaxy Movie didn't just open well—it obliterated multiple box office benchmarks across different categories.

Domestic (US/Canada) Records

  • Biggest 5-Day domestic opening since Moana 2 ($225.4M)
  • Biggest 3-day North American opening since Wicked: For Good
  • Fourth biggest Easter 3-day opening of all-time at $129.4M
  • Biggest U.S./Canada opening year-to-date for 2026
  • 3rd biggest 3-day domestic opening for a film based on a video game behind only A Minecraft Movie ($162.7M) and The Super Mario Bros. Movie

International Records

Overseas, Galaxy blasted off with an estimated $182.4 million from 80 markets , with particularly strong performances in:

  • Mexico: $6.7M scored the biggest Universal opening ever there and the second biggest animated opening ever
  • United Kingdom & Ireland: $3M on Thursday in the No. 1 spot, representing a 50% share of the day's box office for a $7.3M two-day total
  • Germany: $3.8M opening day
  • Spain: $3M opening day

Franchise and Studio Milestones

It will join Shrek, Toy Story and Minions as the only animated franchises to have two titles open to more than $100M for three days at the domestic box office —an exclusive club that demonstrates true four-quadrant appeal.

It is the only animated franchise based on a video game to have two titles open to north of $350 million , cementing Mario as the undisputed king of video game adaptations.

Star-Studded Voice Cast and Production Details

The success isn't just about the Mario name—it's backed by Hollywood A-listers and a production team that understood the assignment.

Main Voice Cast

Chris Pratt, Anya Taylor-Joy, Charlie Day, Jack Black and Keegan-Michael Key reprise their roles, with Benny Safdie, Donald Glover, and Brie Larson joining the cast .

Character Voice Actor Notable Works
Mario Chris Pratt Guardians of the Galaxy, Jurassic World
Princess Peach Anya Taylor-Joy The Queen's Gambit, Dune
Luigi Charlie Day It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia
Bowser Jack Black School of Rock, Kung Fu Panda
Yoshi Donald Glover Atlanta, Community (as Childish Gambino)
Princess Rosalina Brie Larson Captain Marvel, Room (Oscar winner)
Bowser Jr. Benny Safdie Uncut Gems, Oppenheimer
Fox McCloud Glen Powell Top Gun: Maverick, Twisters

Surprise Casting: Fox McCloud's Debut

Fox McCloud was a surprising addition to the "Super Mario Galaxy Movie" cast. Fox is a space pilot from Nintendo's "Star Fox" video games, but he's crossed over with Mario in the "Super Smash Bros." fighting games. Fans are hoping that Fox's inclusion could signal more crossover movies with other Nintendo characters .

Production Insight: Chris Meledandri, the CEO of Illumination, contacted both Powell and Glover back after they pitched themselves for their parts after the first film was released .

Directors and Production Team

Aaron Horvath and Michael Jelenic returned to direct the sequel, which is inspired by the beloved Nintendo game and follows the Brooklyn-based plumbers known as Mario and Luigi as they venture into outer space .

Brian Tyler, who composed the score for The Super Mario Bros. Movie, returned to compose the score for the sequel. The score is performed by a 70-piece orchestra and features arrangements of themes from the two Super Mario Galaxy games and other installments in the Super Mario series .

International Performance: How Each Market Responded

The movie's global appeal demonstrates Mario's universal recognition, though some markets showed stronger enthusiasm than others.

Top International Markets

Top markets so far are Mexico ($6.7 million), the United Kingdom and Ireland ($4.3 million), Germany ($3.8 million) and Spain ($3 million) for opening day alone.

Theater Saturation Strategy

By Friday, the second "Mario" adventure will be playing across more than 49,000 screens in 80 overseas territories , representing one of the widest theatrical releases of 2026.

The pic is booked at 4,900 screens this weekend in Mexico alone, where the sequel at No. 1 is owning 85% share of the total box office .

Premium Format Performance

Updated stats show PLFs, Imax and 3D drove 44% of the North American weekend. Imax screens at 430 produced 8% of tickets sales (or $15M) while exhibitor PLFs did 19%, and 3D overall was 17% .

Japan Release Exception: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie was theatrically released in the United States on April 1, 2026, and in Japan on April 24 —nearly a month later than other territories.

How It Compares to the 2023 Original

While The Super Mario Galaxy Movie posted impressive numbers, it slightly trails its predecessor's historic opening.

Opening Weekend Comparison

Metric Super Mario Bros (2023) Super Mario Galaxy (2026) Difference
Opening Day (Wed) $31M $34.5M +$3.5M (+11%)
3-Day Weekend $146.3M $130.9M -$15.4M (-11%)
5-Day Total (Domestic) $204.6M $190.1M -$14.5M (-7%)
Global Opening $387.8M (like-for-like) $372.5M -$15.3M (-4%)
Production Budget $100M $110M +$10M

Long-Term Trajectory Predictions

Thanks to four-quadrant appeal and multi-generational love for the Nintendo video game, "The Super Mario Bros. Movie" ended up as the second-highest grossing release of 2023 with $1.3 billion .

Industry analysts predict The Super Mario Galaxy Movie will ultimately gross between $950M-$1.1B globally—a phenomenal result, though likely short of the original's $1.36 billion total.

Audience Reception

The Super Mario Galaxy Movie boasts a very impressive A- CinemaScore rating , slightly lower than the first film's A rating but still indicating strong word-of-mouth potential.

Critics were less kind: It received negative reviews from critics and grossed $373 million worldwide against a $110 million budget . However, as with the first film, audience scores diverge significantly from critic reviews.

What This Means for Nintendo's Movie Future

The success of both Mario movies has greenlit an unprecedented expansion of Nintendo's cinematic universe.

Confirmed Nintendo Projects

  • Zelda Movie: Live-action adaptation in development with Sony Pictures
  • Donkey Kong Spinoff: Announced in post-credits scene of first Mario movie
  • Star Fox Expansion: Fans are hoping that Fox's inclusion could signal more crossover movies with other Nintendo characters

Nintendo Switch 2 Synergy

The movie's release coincides perfectly with Mario Kart World launching alongside the Switch 2 itself as the console's flagship title since day one. It's the first mainline kart racer since Mario Kart 8 Deluxe dominated the original Switch for nearly a decade .

Yoshi and the Mysterious Book is locked in for May 21, 2026, as a Switch 2 exclusive. It's the first Yoshi game since Yoshi's Crafted World in 2019. Nintendo announced the release date the same week they revealed Donald Glover will voice Yoshi in the upcoming Super Mario Galaxy movie —demonstrating coordinated marketing across movies and games.

Video Game Movie Industry Impact

With The Super Mario Galaxy Movie now the No. 9 highest-grossing video game movie of all time after just five days , it reinforces that video game adaptations—when done with respect for source material—can compete with traditional Hollywood franchises.

This success follows other gaming adaptations like The Last of Us (HBO), Fallout (Amazon), and the Sonic franchise, creating a golden age for game-to-screen projects.

Philippine Release and Local Impact

Filipino audiences have embraced The Super Mario Galaxy Movie enthusiastically, with major cinema chains reporting sold-out shows throughout opening weekend.

Philippine Box Office Performance

While specific Philippine box office numbers aren't separately reported in international totals, SM Cinema, Ayala Malls Cinemas, and Robinsons Movieworld all reported strong attendance, particularly during the Holy Week school break period.

Cultural Resonance in the Philippines

The Philippines has one of Southeast Asia's strongest Nintendo gaming communities. Super Mario Galaxy (2007) and its sequel (2010) remain beloved titles among Filipino millennials who grew up with the Wii console.

The movie's Easter weekend release timing was particularly strategic for the Philippine market, where Holy Week traditionally sees increased family entertainment consumption.

Where to Watch in the Philippines

  • Metro Manila: All major SM, Ayala, and Robinsons multiplexes
  • IMAX Locations: SM Mall of Asia, SM Megamall, SM Aura Premier
  • Premium Formats: Director's Club, IMAX with Laser, Dolby Atmos screenings available
  • Ticket Prices: ₱250-450 for standard formats, ₱550-850 for premium/IMAX

Gaming Tie-Ins for Filipino Players

The movie's success has sparked renewed interest in Mario games. Filipino gamers searching for free gaming currencies or gaming deals should note that Nintendo rarely offers free premium currency—but eShop sales frequently discount Mario titles by 30-50%.

Broader Industry Impact and What It Means for Gamers

The Post-Pandemic Box Office Recovery

Already, the box office is showing improvement from last year, with ticket sales up 25% from the same point in 2025, according to Comscore .

The domestic box office is passing the $2 billion mark this weekend, up close to 30% from the same Jan. 1-April 5 span a year ago. You can thank the power of IP and the Illumination, Universal and Nintendo team-up, Super Mario Galaxy Movie .

Non-Frequent Moviegoer Impact

Important to note on a tentpole like Super Mario Galaxy Movie is the number of non-frequent moviegoers who came out which was 62% (35% every other month or so, and 27% a few times a year or less). The complaint by the industry has been that it's the non-frequent moviegoers who've shrunk post-pandemic, not necessarily the core cinephiles .

This suggests that family-friendly, IP-driven content remains the key to bringing casual audiences back to theaters—a lesson that benefits the entire exhibition industry.

Competition and Market Share

Second place on domestic charts went to "Project Hail Mary," which had another stellar showing with $30 million in its third outing, a 43% decline. So far, the space adventure starring Ryan Gosling has earned an impressive $217 million in North America and $420.7 million globally .

Even with Mario dominating, other films are finding success—a healthier market dynamic than the "winner-take-all" environment that plagued post-pandemic box office recovery.

Marketing Mastery: How Nintendo and Illumination Sold This Movie

Multi-Platform Marketing Campaign

The promotional campaign for The Super Mario Galaxy Movie was unprecedented in scope:

  • Theme Park Integration: Super Nintendo World attractions at Universal Studios Japan, Hollywood, and Orlando featured Galaxy-themed elements
  • Product Partnerships: Happy Meal toys, cereal brands, apparel collaborations with Uniqlo and H&M
  • Gaming Crossovers: Special events in Mario Kart Tour, Super Mario Run, and other mobile Nintendo games
  • Social Media Dominance: TikTok challenges, YouTube shorts, and Instagram filters generated billions of impressions

Star Power Promotional Tour

The film had its premiere on March 28, 2026 at Minami-za in Kyoto, Japan. Much of the cast and crew were present, including Chris Pratt, Charlie Day, Anya Taylor-Joy, Keegan-Michael Key, Jack Black, Benny Safdie, Brie Larson, and Donald Glover .

Strategic Release Timing

The Wednesday April 1st release was perfectly calculated:

  • Captured Easter weekend family audiences
  • Aligned with school spring breaks across North America
  • Avoided direct competition with other family films
  • Maximized the five-day opening period for record-setting headlines

Frequently Asked Questions

How much money did The Super Mario Galaxy Movie make opening weekend?

The Super Mario Galaxy Movie earned $372.5 million globally in its opening five-day period (April 1-5, 2026), including $190.1 million domestically (US/Canada) and $182.4 million internationally. Its three-day weekend specifically earned $130.9 million in North America.

Is The Super Mario Galaxy Movie available in Philippine cinemas?

Yes, The Super Mario Galaxy Movie is currently showing in all major Philippine cinema chains including SM Cinema, Ayala Malls Cinemas, Robinsons Movieworld, and Vista Cinemas. IMAX and premium format screenings are available at select locations in Metro Manila and major cities. The film was released simultaneously with the global rollout on April 1, 2026.

Who voices Yoshi in The Super Mario Galaxy Movie?

Donald Glover (also known as Childish Gambino) voices Yoshi in The Super Mario Galaxy Movie. This marks Yoshi's first speaking role in a theatrical film, as the character typically communicates through characteristic sounds in the games. Glen Powell voices Fox McCloud, Brie Larson plays Princess Rosalina, and Benny Safdie voices Bowser Jr. as new additions to the cast.

Will The Super Mario Galaxy Movie beat the first movie's box office?

While The Super Mario Galaxy Movie opened strong with $372.5 million globally, it's slightly behind the original Super Mario Bros. Movie's $387.8 million opening. The first film ultimately grossed $1.36 billion worldwide. Industry analysts predict the sequel will finish between $950 million to $1.1 billion globally—an excellent result, but likely short of the original's total.

Are there any Nintendo Switch games related to the movie?

Yes! Nintendo coordinated several game releases with the movie: Mario Kart World launched as the Switch 2's flagship title in early 2026, and Yoshi and the Mysterious Book is set for May 21, 2026, as a Switch 2 exclusive. The original Super Mario Galaxy and Super Mario Galaxy 2 are also available on Nintendo Switch through the GameCube Virtual Console library that launched with Switch 2.

Final Verdict: Mario's Box Office Dominance Continues

The Super Mario Galaxy Movie proves that Nintendo's cinematic ambitions are far from a one-hit wonder. While it may not quite match the unprecedented heights of the 2023 original, this sequel demonstrates the franchise's staying power and broad appeal across demographics and borders.

For Filipino gamers who grew up spinning through galaxies with Mario and Rosalina on the Wii, seeing this beloved game adapted with such production value and star power validates gaming culture's mainstream acceptance. The movie's success also signals more Nintendo properties coming to theaters, creating an exciting future for fans of Link, Donkey Kong, Samus, and other beloved characters.

As AMC CEO Adam Aron stated, "'The Super Mario Galaxy Movie' is exactly the kind of broad, crowd-pleasing release that brings people into theatres. Just as importantly, this success is happening alongside other films that also have been bringing in moviegoers" —suggesting a healthier theatrical ecosystem for everyone.

title: Elden Ring Movie Set Leak: First Look at A24's Epic Film
metaTitle: Elden Ring Movie Set Leaked: Viral Footage Shows Church of Marika
metaDescription: Viral set footage reveals A24's Elden Ring movie starring Ben Whishaw & Kit Connor. Filming starts next week in UK. Everything you need to know about Alex Garland's adaptation.
excerpt: A viral TikTok video showing what appears to be the Elden Ring movie set has taken the gaming world by storm. The leaked footage features a stunning recreation of the Church of Marika, complete with a game-accurate statue, spotted in the English countryside just days before filming reportedly begins.
content:
Elden Ring Movie Set Leak: First Look at A24's Epic Adaptation

Viral footage shows stunning Church of Marika recreation as Alex Garland's ambitious film adaptation enters production

Breaking News: The leaked TikTok video has surpassed 2 million views and racked up 25,000 upvotes on Reddit , sending the Elden Ring community into a frenzy. Filming reportedly begins next week in the UK.

Table of Contents

  1. The Viral Set Leak That Broke the Internet
  2. Breaking Down the Church of Marika Set
  3. Production Timeline and Filming Location
  4. Cast, Crew, and Alex Garland's Vision
  5. Why Elden Ring Is Perfect for Cinema
  6. What to Expect from the A24 Adaptation
  7. Release Date and Latest Updates
  8. Frequently Asked Questions

The Viral Set Leak That Broke the Internet

In what may be the most exciting leak in gaming movie history, TikTok user Throxtv posted a short video on Friday showing a ruined stone building with a statue that looks exactly like the churches of Marika found throughout The Lands Between . The footage immediately went viral across social media platforms, with fans dissecting every frame for clues about A24's highly anticipated adaptation.

What the Leaked Footage Shows

The video features a sweeping pan across a ruined stone structure with Gothic arches crumbling in elegant decay, temporary fencing and construction barriers suggesting an active site, and at the center stands a robed female statue with arms extended in a cruciform pose —a visual directly lifted from Queen Marika's iconic imagery in the game.

The authenticity of the leak has been hotly debated, but multiple pieces of evidence point to this being genuine. The follow-up footage reveals construction materials bearing the logo of Hedgehog Construction, a company that specializes in "scenery construction for film and television" . Even more telling, by the time a third video was captured, the Church of Marika had been covered with tarps and two guards were stationed nearby—presumably to prevent more leaked footage .

Fan Reactions and Viral Spread

The gaming community's response has been overwhelming. The leaked footage appeared on Reddit and TikTok with the caption "Elden Ring movie set spotted" and has already generated close to 175,000 views across platforms. Reddit's r/Eldenring subreddit exploded with analysis, speculation, and excitement.

Community Insight: One Redditor wrote, "My heart says movie set, my brain says elaborate LARP project" , perfectly capturing the mix of hope and skepticism among fans.

Want to stay updated on gaming news while earning rewards? Check out our guide on how to earn GCash through gaming to maximize your hobby.

Breaking Down the Church of Marika Set

Game-Accurate Design Details

Queen Marika's in-game model shows her fragmented, often posed as if crucified against an invisible elden ring, with a hooded, flowing robe, arms outstretched, and a somber, featureless face that captures the character's enigmatic sorrow . The leaked statue appears to match this description with remarkable precision.

Whether it's fiberglass, resin, or actual carved stone remains unknown, but the level of detail suggests significant budget and intent . This level of craftsmanship aligns with what we'd expect from an A24 production, especially one helmed by Alex Garland, who is known for prioritizing practical effects.

Which Church of Marika Is It?

Fans have been debating which specific Church of Marika the set represents. The statue is more or less intact compared to all the broken ones that inhabit the DLC, and it looks like it could be the third church of Marika , though it's too early to know for certain how it will be used in the film.

The Elden Ring film has been rumored to be a prequel of sorts, so it might end up being the Second Church of Marika in a slightly less dilapidated state, or it could be a fifth Church of Marika that was never featured in the game, with the area itself looking a lot like Limgrave .

Production Quality and Practical Effects

The commitment to practical effects is particularly significant. In late 2024, reports emerged that A24 had partnered with acclaimed director Alex Garland to develop an Elden Ring film adaptation, and Garland's known preference for practical effects over green screen aligns perfectly with what this footage shows .

Set Element Game Counterpart Status in Leak
Queen Marika Statue Church of Marika Sites Fully visible, intact
Gothic Arches Limgrave Architecture Crumbling, detailed
Stone Ruins Third Church of Marika Construction phase
Open Landscape Limgrave Plains English countryside

Production Timeline and Filming Location

Filming Starts Next Week

Breaking news from industry insiders confirms the production timeline is accelerating rapidly. Garland aggressively pursued the A24-backed adaptation of the mega-hit game, writing a sprawling 160-page script—plus 40 pages of visuals—entirely on spec, and even flew to Japan himself to pitch the idea directly to Hidetaka Miyazaki, who ultimately gave Garland his blessing .

According to World of Reel sources, principal photography is set to begin as early as next week, making this leak perfectly timed—and explaining why security was quickly deployed to the location.

UK Filming Locations

Kotaku reached out to THROX and they confirmed that the set they stumbled upon is somewhere in England . The choice of the UK for filming makes perfect sense from both a practical and aesthetic standpoint.

The English countryside naturally provides the gothic, misty atmosphere that defines Elden Ring's visual identity. Smart of the production company to save on VFX costs by shooting the film in England, because now they won't have to alter the weather in post to make things look dark and miserable .

Budget Expectations

The film is already being called a potential record-breaker for A24 in terms of budget—the scale of the original game suggests significant investment in CGI and production . This would surpass A24's previous high-water marks, including Civil War's $50 million production budget and Marty Supreme's reported $70 million .

Verification Note: While the leaked footage appears authentic based on construction equipment, location details, and subsequent security measures, neither A24 nor Bandai Namco has officially confirmed these videos show the Elden Ring movie set.

Cast, Crew, and Alex Garland's Vision

Confirmed Cast Members

The production has attracted significant acting talent. Casting includes Kit Connor ("Heartstopper"), Ben Whishaw ("Skyfall"), and Cailee Spaeny ("Priscilla," "Alien: Romulus"), who are all said to have the three lead roles .

  • Kit Connor - Known for Netflix's "Heartstopper," Connor brings youthful energy perfect for a Tarnished protagonist
  • Ben Whishaw - The James Bond veteran and Emmy winner adds gravitas and character depth
  • Cailee Spaeny - Fresh off acclaimed performances in "Priscilla" and "Alien: Romulus," Spaeny is one of Hollywood's rising stars

Specific character assignments haven't been revealed, though some fans want to see Whishaw play Elden Ring's important Vyke character .

Alex Garland's Passionate Pitch

This isn't just another studio-driven video game adaptation. It's an unusually hands-on move for a filmmaker of Garland's stature, and Garland seems to be treating "Elden Ring" less like a commercial product and more like an artistic obsession—it's the kind of passion project he's betting his reputation on .

The Elden Ring movie was announced back in May 2025 and was approved by Hidetaka Miyazaki himself, after director Alex Garland flew to Japan and presented him with a 160-page draft of his vision . This level of dedication from an Oscar-nominated filmmaker speaks volumes about the project's potential.

Production Team

The film will be produced by Peter Rice alongside Andrew Macdonald and Allon Reich from DNA, as well as George R. R. Martin and Vince Gerardis . Having George R.R. Martin—who wrote the mythological backstory for the game—involved in production ensures faithfulness to the source material.
