Fan Reactions and Community Speculation

Overwhelming Positive Reception

The leaked footage has fans absolutely hyped for what's to come from Alex Garland and A24 when further official details about the Elden Ring movie start to trickle out . The immediate response across social media has been overwhelmingly positive, with many praising the apparent authenticity of the set design.

Game Accuracy Praise

Reddit and TikTok users have been particularly impressed with how faithful the sets appear to the source material. The footage showcases an in-the-works set with the Statue of Marika and a stone structure that fans say looks like "was literally ripped straight from the game" .

Concerns and Questions

While excitement is high, some fans remain cautiously optimistic. Gamers who have played the epic and punishing FromSoftware hit know that dialogue is minimal in the game, but that there is plenty of worldbuilding to go around, so adapting the story into a live-action movie definitely seems like a challenge .

Elden Ring fans are busy speculating what the movie could be about now that they've seen something as recognizable as a church of Marika, though very little else is known about the approach director Alex Garland will take with it .

What to Expect from the Adaptation

The Game's Massive Success

Released in 2022 and co-created with George R. R. Martin, "Elden Ring" sold more than 30 million copies worldwide and was crowned Game of the Year . This title was released on February 25, 2022, and has shipped more than 30 million units worldwide .

The Challenge of Adaptation

FromSoftware games are notoriously difficult to adapt due to their unique storytelling approach. ELDEN RING is an action RPG set in an authentic dark fantasy world , and the game allows players to explore vast environments and dungeons to discover the unknown and enjoy the sense of accomplishment that comes from overcoming obstacles and challenges .

The challenge lies in translating this environmental storytelling to a linear film narrative without losing the essence of what makes Elden Ring special.

A24's Track Record

A24 is doubling down on the video game movie business as they are also developing a Death Stranding film based on the Hideo Kojima franchise , showing the studio's commitment to bringing prestigious video game IPs to cinema.

What Makes This Adaptation Special

  • Passionate Director: Alex Garland personally fought for the project with a complete spec script
  • Source Material Involvement: George R.R. Martin is both a producer and the original lore creator
  • Game-Accurate Production Design: Leaked sets show faithful recreation of in-game locations
  • Established Cast: Mix of proven talent and rising stars
  • A24 Backing: Studio known for elevated, artistic genre films

The Bottom Line

The leaked Elden Ring movie set footage has given fans their first concrete glimpse of what promises to be one of the most ambitious video game adaptations in recent years. With fans having no clue what the Elden Ring movie will be like in terms of plot, characters, and lore, if these first set images are any indication of what's to come, good things are on the horizon .

The combination of Alex Garland's proven directorial vision, A24's commitment to quality filmmaking, George R.R. Martin's involvement, and the stunning game-accurate set design visible in the leaks suggests this adaptation is being handled with the care and respect it deserves.

While we likely won't see the film in theaters until 2027, the fact that physical sets are being constructed and production appears to be moving forward is encouraging news for the millions of Elden Ring fans worldwide—including the passionate gaming community here in the Philippines.

Elden Ring Movie Set Leak Reveals First Look at Alex Garland's A24 Epic

Published April 5, 2026 | Last Updated: April 5, 2026

Breaking News: Leaked footage from the Elden Ring movie set has gone viral, showing game-accurate recreations of iconic locations. The videos have generated over 175,000 views across TikTok and Reddit since April 3, 2026.

The internet is ablaze with excitement after leaked footage appeared on Reddit and TikTok with the caption "Elden Ring movie set spotted" and has already generated close to 175,000 views . For fans of FromSoftware's masterpiece, this represents the first tangible proof that Alex Garland's highly anticipated A24 adaptation is moving forward—and it looks absolutely stunning.

The Elden Ring film adaptation was first announced back in May 2025 by A24 and Bandai Namco , but since then, details have been scarce. Now, thanks to a lucky discovery in the English countryside, we finally have our first glimpse of The Lands Between brought to life.

Table of Contents

  1. The Leaked Set Footage: What We Saw
  2. How the Set Was Discovered
  3. Elden Ring Movie: Everything We Know

  5. Fan Reactions and Community Response
  6. What This Means for Video Game Adaptations
  7. Release Date Expectations and What's Next
  8. Frequently Asked Questions

The Leaked Set Footage: What We Saw

Throxtv, an Elden Ring fan and Twitch streamer, posted a short video on Friday of a ruined stone building with a statue of a woman that looks exactly like the churches of Marika found throughout The Lands Between. The open field it's sitting in resembles the game's opening area, Limgrave, minus the fences surrounding it .

The Church of Marika Recreation

The star of the leaked footage is undoubtedly the Marika statue. The biggest giveaway is the Statue of Marika, which many commenters on Reddit and social media are already praising for looking like it was adapted straight from the video game . The attention to detail is remarkable—from the cruciform pose to the Gothic stonework surrounding it.

Images and clips circulating on social media appear to show large-scale set construction, including a detailed replica of Queen Marika's statue. The environment closely resembles the Gothic architecture and visual style seen in the original game, suggesting a strong emphasis on authenticity in the film's design .

Additional Set Details Revealed

In a follow-up video posted earlier today, Throxtv showed off the opposite side of the church and the other props nearby. Wagons, barrels, and stacks of cinderblocks can be seen, along with construction equipment . These props suggest the production team is committed to recreating the medieval fantasy aesthetic that made Elden Ring so visually distinctive.

Production Confirmation: The cinderblocks bear the logo of Hedgehog Construction, a company known for providing "specialist scenery construction for film and television", according to its website —adding legitimacy to the leak.

Authenticity That Impressed Fans

What's striking about the leaked footage is how faithfully it recreates the in-game locations. The footage showcases an in-the-works set with the Statue of Marika and a stone structure that fans such as omgItsGhostDog say looks like "was literally ripped straight from the game" . This level of detail suggests Alex Garland and his team are taking the source material seriously.

How the Set Was Discovered

The footage appears to have been recorded by a fan somewhere in the UK, and was originally posted to TikTok by user throxtv earlier today . The discovery wasn't entirely by chance— Kotaku reached out to THROX to ask them a few questions about their discovery, and they confirmed that the set they stumbled upon is somewhere in England. THROX also stated that they didn't simply discover it by chance, as a friend of his was actually the first to spot the set and passed the information on to them .

Location Details

Production is now underway, with reports indicating that filming is taking place in the United Kingdom . The choice of the UK as a filming location makes perfect sense—the British countryside provides the ideal backdrop for Elden Ring's dark fantasy aesthetic, and the weather conditions naturally match the game's moody atmosphere.

Security Measures Taken

Following the viral spread of the initial footage, production appears to have tightened security. It appears the church has been camouflaged by a tarp to protect it from photos, and has two people standing outside—presumably to stop anyone else from trying to take a peek . This response suggests the leaked footage is indeed from the official production.

Video Spread Across Social Media

Newly surfaced fan-recorded footage of the Elden Ring movie set has started to circulate on various social media channels such as Reddit and TikTok . The clips quickly gained traction, with the clip has since gone viral, amassing over 25,000 upvotes on the game's dedicated subreddit . The rapid spread demonstrates the intense anticipation surrounding this adaptation.

Elden Ring Movie: Everything We Know

Let's break down all confirmed information about what could be A24's most ambitious production to date.

Director: Alex Garland

We know for sure that legendary writer and director Alex Garland (28 Days Later, Ex Machina, Annihilation) is leading the project, and that it's a live-action adaptation . Garland's track record with cerebral, atmospheric sci-fi and horror makes him an intriguing choice for Elden Ring's complex world.

Announced back in May 2025, the Elden Ring movie was approved by Hidetaka Miyazaki himself, after director Alex Garland flew to Japan and presented him with a 160-page draft of his vision . This level of preparation demonstrates Garland's commitment to the source material—he's not just a director-for-hire but a genuine fan of the game.

Fun Fact: He's even beaten Elden Ring six times , proving his dedication to understanding the game's world and mechanics.

Production Team

To bring the epic world and intense action of ELDEN RING to film, the project will be led by filmmaker Alex Garland (Ex Machina, Civil War, Warfare) as writer and director. The film will be produced by Peter Rice alongside Andrew Macdonald and Allon Reich from DNA, and George R. R. Martin and Vince Gerardis .

Having George R.R. Martin involved is particularly significant, as Martin, who contributed to the game's lore, is also involved as a creative consultant . This ensures continuity between the game's worldbuilding and the film's narrative.

Cast Announcements

Since then, we've not actually heard too much about the project, beyond a few casting announcements (including Ben Whishaw and Cailee Spaeny, who have been cast in undisclosed roles) . While specific character assignments remain unknown, these talented actors signal that A24 is assembling a quality ensemble cast.

A24 and Bandai Namco Partnership

The Elden Ring film is being produced in collaboration between A24 and Bandai Namco . This partnership combines A24's reputation for auteur-driven cinema with Bandai Namco's understanding of the source material—a promising combination for a faithful adaptation.

Current Production Status and Timeline

Filming Has Begun

While it's unconfirmed at the moment and there's no official word that the movie has started filming, the footage is extremely compelling and is unquestionably Elden Ring-related . However, the set in the video seems to still be in the works and is not complete yet, so it doesn't offer a full picture of whatever the project might happen to be .

Despite the lack of official confirmation, while it was previously stated that production company A24 intended to start filming in 2026, there was no exact announcement regarding the start of the film's principal photography. However, based on the video provided by Elden Ring streamer THROX on TikTok, we can probably expect an announcement on that front relatively soon .

Expected Release Window

It's likely the film won't see the light of day until 2027 at earliest, and the recently leaked movie set footage is a good indication that the ball is already rolling in the right direction in terms of the production timeline. The film is currently expected to arrive in theaters around 2027, though a confirmed release date has not yet been announced .

Milestone Date Status
Official Announcement May 2025 ✓ Confirmed
Set Construction April 2026 ✓ Underway (leaked)
Principal Photography 2026 ⏳ Expected
Theatrical Release 2027 (estimated) ⏳ Pending

What the Set Reveals About the Story

Assuming then that the set leak is real, it may confirm when the movie takes place — post-Shattering. Some presumed (or hoped) that it would be a prequel based on George R. R. Martin's writing for the game, showing what The Lands Between looked like prior to Rani stealing a Rune of Death fragment, but the destroyed ruins of the Church of Marika seen in the clip indicate otherwise .

This suggests the film will follow events during or after the game's main storyline, rather than serving as a prequel to the Shattering event.

Fan Reactions and Community Response

Overwhelmingly Positive Response

The leaked footage has fans absolutely hyped for what's to come from Alex Garland and A24 when further official details about the Elden Ring movie start to trickle out . The community's enthusiasm stems from the apparent faithfulness to the source material.

It's an odd sight, very loosely fenced off in the middle of an otherwise vacant, green field, but the actual detail in the reconstruction is quite convincing and naturally has commenters feeling positive about the film's potential authenticity .

Skepticism and AI Concerns

Not everyone was immediately convinced. But it's worth taking this clip with a grain of salt. AI has improved significantly over the last few years, to the point where telltale signs are becoming harder to spot. What does raise red flags in this video is that no crew are present on set, and there have been no reports of principal photography starting .

However, the physical evidence—including construction company logos and follow-up videos—has largely dispelled these concerns.

Community Speculation

Meanwhile, Elden Ring fans are busy speculating what the movie could be about now that they've seen something as recognizable as a church of Marika. Very little else is known about the approach director Alex Garland will take with it .

What This Means for Video Game Adaptations

Practical Effects Over Pure CGI

Still, if the set is genuine, it suggests Garland's adaptation is leaning heavily into the look of the Lands Between and using practical builds to bring some of Elden Ring's most recognizable imagery to life . This practical approach could set a new standard for video game adaptations.

A24's Biggest Production

The scale of the set construction suggests this will be A24's largest and most ambitious project to date. The studio, known for smaller-budget auteur films, appears to be betting big on Elden Ring's built-in fanbase and cultural cachet.

The Challenge of Adapting Souls Games

Gamers who have played the epic and punishing FromSoftware hit know that dialogue is minimal in the game, but that there is plenty of worldbuilding to go around. Adapting the story into a live-action movie definitely seems like a challenge, so the playerbase is understandably eager to see what approach the team will take .

Elden Ring's narrative is largely environmental and interpretive, delivered through item descriptions, cryptic NPC dialogue, and visual storytelling. Translating this to a traditional film narrative will require creative adaptation while maintaining the game's mysterious atmosphere.

Following in The Last of Us's Footsteps

The success of HBO's The Last of Us has proven that video game adaptations can achieve both critical acclaim and commercial success when treated with respect. Garland's meticulous approach—including his 160-page pitch and multiple playthroughs—suggests he understands this responsibility.

Industry Context: With over 30 million copies sold worldwide since its February 2022 release, Elden Ring has proven its mainstream appeal extends far beyond the typical Souls fanbase—making it a valuable IP for film adaptation.

Release Date Expectations and What's Next

2027 Theatrical Release Most Likely

Based on the current production timeline, a 2027 release window appears most realistic. Announced in May 2025, the Elden Ring movie is currently undated. Frankly, that means Elden Ring is a fair way off from coming to cinemas. 2027 could be realistic – depending on when filming begins .

What to Expect Next

Following these leaks, fans can anticipate:

  • Official Production Announcement: A24 and Bandai Namco will likely issue a statement confirming principal photography has begun
  • Additional Casting News: More cast members will be revealed as filming progresses
  • First Official Images: A24 typically releases high-quality promotional stills early in production
  • Teaser Trailer: Likely at a major gaming event like Summer Game Fest or The Game Awards

A24's Marketing Strategy

At this time, the videos have not been taken down and A24 has not released any kind of statement confirming or denying that this is a production set for the movie . This silence could be strategic, allowing organic buzz to build before official confirmation.

Garland's Post-Warfare Schedule

Working in its favor is the fact that director Alex Garland only has the third 28 Years Later film in the works now the 2025 movie and its sequel The Bone Temple have been released . This means Garland can dedicate his full attention to Elden Ring without competing commitments.

No Official Confirmation Yet: The Elden Ring film does not have a confirmed release date at this point . All dates mentioned are estimates based on production timelines.

The leaked Elden Ring movie set footage represents far more than just a viral TikTok moment—it's tangible proof that one of gaming's most beloved franchises is being treated with the care and authenticity it deserves. Whatever the case, if this set leak isn't fraudulent, it's an almost 1:1 recreation of an iconic POI from the game, giving us an insight into just how authentic this adaptation aims to be .

Alex Garland's passion for the source material, combined with A24's commitment to quality filmmaking and practical effects, has created genuine optimism in the gaming community. While video game adaptations have historically struggled, the meticulous attention to detail visible in these leaked images suggests Elden Ring could join The Last of Us and recent Sonic films as proof that faithful, well-crafted adaptations can succeed.

As we await official confirmation and additional details, one thing is clear: The Lands Between are coming to theaters, and based on what we've seen so far, the journey will be worth the wait.

Frequently Asked Questions

When is the Elden Ring movie release date?

The Elden Ring movie does not have an official release date yet, but industry sources estimate a 2027 theatrical release based on the current production timeline. The film was announced in May 2025, and leaked set footage from April 2026 confirms production is underway in the United Kingdom.

Who is directing the Elden Ring movie?

Alex Garland is directing and writing the Elden Ring movie for A24 and Bandai Namco. Garland is known for Ex Machina, Annihilation, Civil War, and 28 Days Later. He presented FromSoftware's Hidetaka Miyazaki with a 160-page script to secure the project and has beaten Elden Ring six times, demonstrating his commitment to the source material.

What was shown in the leaked Elden Ring movie set footage?

The leaked footage shows a detailed recreation of a Church of Marika, complete with a game-accurate statue and Gothic stone architecture. Additional videos revealed props including wagons, barrels, and construction materials bearing the logo of Hedgehog Construction, a specialist film scenery company. The footage has generated over 175,000 views across TikTok and Reddit.

Will the Elden Ring movie be a prequel or follow the game's story?

Based on the leaked set footage showing destroyed ruins of the Church of Marika, the movie appears to take place post-Shattering rather than as a prequel. This suggests it will follow events during or after the game's main storyline, though specific plot details have not been officially confirmed.

Who is in the cast of the Elden Ring movie?

Confirmed cast members include Ben Whishaw and Cailee Spaeny, though their specific roles have not been disclosed. Kit Connor has been reported to be in talks for a leading role. George R.R. Martin is involved as a creative consultant, maintaining continuity with the worldbuilding he created for the original game.

title: GTA 5 Leaving Xbox Game Pass April 15: What You Need to Know
metaTitle: GTA 5 Leaving Xbox Game Pass April 15, 2026 - Full Details
metaDescription: GTA 5 exits Xbox Game Pass April 15, 2026 after 12 months—the longest stay ever. Here's why it's leaving, what games join the list, and GTA 6 connection.
excerpt: Grand Theft Auto 5 is leaving Xbox Game Pass on April 15, 2026, marking the end of its longest-ever stint on the subscription service at exactly 12 months. The strategic timing—just seven months before GTA 6's November 19 release—has sparked intense speculation about Rockstar's marketing plans.
content:
GTA 5 Leaving Xbox Game Pass April 15: What You Need to Know

Published April 4, 2026 | Updated today

Quick Summary: Grand Theft Auto 5 departs Xbox Game Pass on April 15, 2026, alongside four other titles. Both Enhanced and Legacy editions will be removed. Current subscribers get at least 20% discounts to purchase before departure. This removal comes exactly 12 months after GTA 5's return to the service—marking its longest Game Pass stay ever.

Table of Contents

  1. Official Confirmation and Departure Date
  2. Complete List of Games Leaving April 15
  3. The GTA 6 Connection: Strategic Timing Explained
  4. GTA 5's Xbox Game Pass History: A Pattern Emerges
  5. What Happens to Your Progress and GTA Online Access
  6. Current Discounts and Alternatives
  7. What's Coming to Game Pass in April 2026
  8. Frequently Asked Questions

Official Confirmation and Departure Date

On the morning of April 2, 2026, Microsoft updated the Xbox Game Pass website to reveal five titles leaving the service at the halfway point this month , with Grand Theft Auto 5 set to depart on April 15, 2026 .

As revealed through the Xbox App on PC, players will see GTA 5 and four more games leave Game Pass this month, including Grand Theft Auto V (Enhanced and Legacy Editions), Eiyuden Chronicles: Hundred Heroes, Terra Invicta, My Little Pony: A Zephyr Heights Mystery, and Ashen .

Both Versions Are Leaving

The most notable departure is GTA V, which will no longer be available in either its enhanced version for Xbox Series consoles or its original Xbox One version . This means whether you've been playing the ray-traced Enhanced edition or the Legacy version, both will disappear from the Game Pass library simultaneously.

Important Deadline: You have until 11:59 PM PT on April 14, 2026 to finish any in-progress missions or achievements. After April 15, you'll need to own the game to continue playing.

How Players Were Notified

According to folks at PureXbox, five titles are set to depart from the gaming service, as they were flagged as "leaving soon" in the official Xbox mobile app . If you're a Game Pass subscriber, you should see the "Leaving Soon" badge when browsing GTA 5 in the Xbox app on console, PC, or mobile devices.

Complete List of Games Leaving April 15

While GTA 5 grabs the headlines, four other titles are also exiting the Xbox Game Pass catalog on the same date:

Game Title Genre Platforms Time on Game Pass
Grand Theft Auto V (Enhanced & Legacy) Open-World Action Console, PC, Cloud 12 months (April 2025 - April 2026)
Eiyuden Chronicle: Hundred Heroes JRPG Console, PC, Cloud ~24 months (April 2024 - April 2026)
Terra Invicta Grand Strategy PC Game Pass only Variable (with previous removal error)
Ashen Action RPG (Souls-like) Console, PC, Cloud Second stint on service
My Little Pony: A Zephyr Heights Mystery Family Adventure Console, PC, Cloud ~3 months (January 2026 - April 2026)

Notable Details About Each Departure

Eiyuden Chronicle: Hundred Heroes is a classic-style JRPG developed by Rabbit & Bear Studios, a team made up of veterans from the beloved Suikoden series. The game launched in April 2024 and received generally favorable reviews, holding a Metacritic score of 79 on PC, and was praised as a love letter to classic JRPGs, offering over 100 recruitable characters .

Terra Invicta is currently only available on PC Game Pass and Xbox Game Pass Premium and Ultimate, so Essential users haven't been able to play it. In September 2025, Microsoft mistakenly announced Terra Invicta was leaving Xbox Game Pass, issuing a correction that the game is, in fact, staying six days after claiming it was leaving . This time, the departure appears to be final.

Rounding out the list is Annapurna Interactive's Ashen. Originally an Xbox exclusive, Ashen was one of the best RPGs of 2018 , offering a minimalist take on the Souls-like formula with unique co-op mechanics.

The GTA 6 Connection: Strategic Timing Explained

The timing of GTA 5's removal is no coincidence. Take-Two Interactive has reiterated that Grand Theft Auto 6 is on track for its November 19, 2026 release date , putting the GTA 5 Game Pass exit exactly seven months before the highly anticipated sequel launches.

Why Rockstar Is Pulling GTA 5 Now

It's speculated that Rockstar will ramp up its marketing efforts for the game this Summer, so it's a fitting time to take GTA 5 off Xbox Game Pass. Removing the old GTA from many gamers' libraries is an easy way to leave audiences hungry for more right before promoting the new one .

According to industry analysis, this strategic move serves three key purposes:

  1. Revenue Pressure: It creates purchase pressure, creating a surge of revenue for Take-Two from every Game Pass subscriber who converts to a paid purchase
  2. Clearing the Stage: Rockstar does not want potential customers playing the predecessor for free through a subscription service
  3. Value Positioning: Removing the free alternative makes GTA 6's premium pricing more palatable when it launches in November

GTA 6 Marketing Timeline

The departure of GTA 5 comes at a strategic time for Rockstar Games. The title leaves the catalog a few months before the start of the GTA 6 marketing campaign, scheduled to begin in the summer of 2026. The publisher Take-Two Interactive, through its CEO Strauss Zelnick, indicated that more intense promotion of the new game should occur from that time onwards .

GTA 6 Quick Facts:
  • Release Date: November 19, 2026
  • Platforms: PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S (PC date TBA)
  • Setting: Vice City and the state of Leonida (based on Florida)
  • Expected Marketing Push: Summer 2026

For Filipino gamers planning to purchase GTA 6 at launch, you might want to check out our guide on how to earn GCash for gaming purchases to prepare for the November release.

GTA 5's Xbox Game Pass History: A Pattern Emerges

Grand Theft Auto V will exit the Xbox Game Pass library on 15 April 2026 — exactly twelve months after its most recent return. Previous stints were considerably shorter: four months each in 2020 and 2021, and six months from July 2023 to January 2024. The current run marks a clear record .

The Complete Timeline

Game Pass Period Duration Platforms Available
2020 (First stint) 4 months Console only
2021 (Second stint) 4 months Console only
July 2023 - January 2024 6 months Console only
April 2025 - April 2026 12 months (Record) Console, PC, Cloud

Worth noting: the April 2025 return was also the first time GTA V became available to PC Game Pass subscribers, not just console members. That expanded the game's reach considerably compared to prior appearances .

The Recurring Pattern

Anyone who's subscribed to the service for a while will know this isn't the first time this has happened. Rockstar's massively popular crime sim left the platform in early 2024 before coming back in April 2025 .

This cyclical pattern suggests Rockstar and Take-Two use Game Pass strategically—adding GTA 5 during quieter periods to drive engagement, then removing it when they want to maximize direct sales or prepare for major announcements.

What Previous Leaks Revealed About Costs

In September 2023, a major Xbox leak revealed how much the company expects to pay to get Rockstar's game on Game Pass. Microsoft also noted they would expect Take-Two to ask for around $12 to $15 million a month to be on Game Pass for approximately 30 million hours of time played in the game .

At those rates, GTA 5's 12-month stay could have cost Microsoft somewhere between $144-180 million in licensing fees—demonstrating just how valuable the title remains even 13 years after its original 2013 release.

What Happens to Your Progress and GTA Online Access

If you've been playing GTA 5 through Game Pass, here's exactly what happens when the game leaves on April 15:

Story Mode Progress

  • Saves Remain: All your single-player progress, completed missions, and unlocked items stay saved to your Xbox profile
  • Can't Launch: You won't be able to launch the game unless you purchase it
  • Purchase Restores Access: If you buy GTA 5, you can immediately continue from where you left off

GTA Online Access

If Game Pass is your only access, GTA Online goes away with it on April 15. You can still play GTA Online after GTA V leaves Game Pass, but only if you own Grand Theft Auto V .

Critical for GTA Online Players: Your Online character, rank, properties, vehicles, and GTA$ are all stored on Rockstar's servers and will remain safe. However, you MUST own the game to access them after April 15. Your progress won't be deleted, but it will be inaccessible through Game Pass alone.

Who Is NOT Affected

Players who already own GTA V are not losing their copy through this change . If you:

  • Purchased GTA 5 digitally before it came to Game Pass
  • Own a physical disc copy
  • Bought the game during any previous Game Pass discount period

...then you'll continue playing without interruption. The removal only affects those accessing the game exclusively through their Game Pass subscription.

How to Check Your Ownership Status

Check whether your Xbox copy of Grand Theft Auto V comes from Game Pass or from a purchase by following these steps:

  1. Go to "My Games & Apps" on your Xbox
  2. Find Grand Theft Auto V in your library
  3. Press the Menu button (three horizontal lines)
  4. Select "Manage game and add-ons"
  5. If you see a Game Pass logo or "Xbox Game Pass" listed as the source, you're playing via subscription
  6. If you see a purchase date or "Owned" status, you have a permanent license

Current Discounts and Alternatives

You'll find discounts of at least 20% on all of these Xbox Game Pass titles until they leave on April 15th, and some (such as GTA V and Eiyuden Chronicle) are reduced even further as part of the Xbox Spring Sale 2026 .

How to Purchase Before It Leaves

Xbox Game Pass discounts the game by 20% so before it leaves you can purchase it digitally a little bit cheaper . Here's how to take advantage:

  1. Open the Xbox Game Pass app or Microsoft Store
  2. Search for "Grand Theft Auto V"
  3. Select either the Enhanced or Legacy edition (or bundles)
  4. The Game Pass member discount applies automatically at checkout
  5. Purchase before April 15 to keep the discounted price

Should You Buy GTA 5 Now or Wait?

Buy Now If:

  • You're actively playing GTA Online and have invested time/money in your character
  • You haven't finished the story mode and want to complete it
  • You want the Enhanced edition features (ray tracing, improved performance on Xbox Series X/S)
  • The 20%+ discount makes it worthwhile for you

Wait If:

  • GTA 6 launches in 7 months and you'd rather save money for that
  • You've already completed everything you wanted in GTA 5
  • You're waiting to see if it returns to Game Pass again in the future
  • You primarily play other games and GTA 5 was just occasional entertainment
For Budget-Conscious Gamers: If you're in the Philippines and looking to maximize your gaming budget, check out our deals page for gaming gift cards and credits that might help offset the purchase cost.

Alternative Ways to Play GTA 5

If you don't want to purchase GTA 5 right now, here are your options:

  • Wait for sales: GTA 5 frequently goes on sale during major Xbox sales events (Summer Sale, Black Friday, etc.)
  • Physical copies: Used physical discs can often be found cheaper than digital versions
  • Game sharing: If a family member owns it digitally and you're in the same Xbox Home sharing group, you might have access
  • Possible return to Game Pass: Based on history, GTA 5 could return to Game Pass again, though timing is unpredictable

What's Coming to Game Pass in April 2026

While losing GTA 5 stings, March 2026 brought in a solid lineup across two waves. Wave 1 included Kingdom Come: Deliverance 2, EA Sports F1 25, and Cyberpunk 2077, among others. Wave 2 then added Resident Evil 7: Biohazard, Like a Dragon: Infinite Wealth, and Clair Obscur: Expedition 33, the latter of which took home Game of the Year for 2025 .

Confirmed April 2026 Additions

We've got some amazing stuff confirmed for Xbox Game Pass in April 2026 to lessen the blow, including the day one arrivals of Hades 2, Replaced, Aphelion, Kiln and Vampire Crawlers !

In late March, Microsoft unveiled seven games coming to Xbox Game Pass in April 2026. Those additions include Final Fantasy 4 to continue the trend of FF titles coming to the service each month, and the fan-favorite roguelike Hades 2 .

Game Genre Day One? Tier
Hades 2 Roguelike ✅ Yes All tiers
Final Fantasy IV JRPG No All tiers
Replaced Action Platformer ✅ Yes All tiers
Vampire Crawlers Action ✅ Yes All tiers
Aphelion Shooter ✅ Yes All tiers
Kiln Adventure ✅ Yes All tiers
NBA 2K26 Sports No All tiers

What to Play Instead of GTA 5

If you're looking for open-world experiences currently on Game Pass after GTA 5 leaves:

  • Cyberpunk 2077 (Added March 2026) - Massive open-world RPG with deep story and combat
  • Like a Dragon: Infinite Wealth - Modern RPG with vibrant open world and engaging combat
  • Starfield - Bethesda's space RPG with exploration and base building
  • Forza Horizon 5 - If you enjoyed GTA's driving, this offers the best racing on Game Pass

For multiplayer alternatives to GTA Online, check out our guide on free ways to enjoy online gaming experiences without spending extra.

Frequently Asked Questions

When exactly does GTA 5 leave Xbox Game Pass?

GTA 5 leaves Xbox Game Pass on April 15, 2026 at 11:59 PM PT. Both the Enhanced and Legacy editions will be removed from all Game Pass tiers (Console, PC, Cloud, Ultimate, Premium, and Standard).

Will my GTA Online character be deleted when GTA 5 leaves Game Pass?

No. Your GTA Online character, rank, money, properties, and vehicles are stored on Rockstar's servers and will NOT be deleted. However, you won't be able to access them through Game Pass after April 15 unless you purchase the game. If you buy GTA 5 later, all your progress will still be there.

Is this the last time GTA 5 will be on Game Pass?

Not necessarily. This is the fourth time GTA 5 has left Xbox Game Pass since 2020. The game has a pattern of returning after several months. However, with GTA 6 launching November 19, 2026, Rockstar may keep GTA 5 off Game Pass longer this time to maximize GTA 6 sales and attention.

Can I still get the Game Pass discount after April 15?

No. The at-least-20% Game Pass member discount on GTA 5 expires when the game leaves the service on April 15, 2026. After that date, you'll pay the standard retail price unless there's a separate Xbox Store sale. If you're considering buying it, do so before the deadline to get the discount.

Will GTA 6 come to Xbox Game Pass at launch?

Extremely unlikely. Take-Two Interactive has repeatedly stated they don't put major AAA titles on subscription services at launch, as it cannibalizes direct sales. Based on GTA 5's history, GTA 6 might come to Game Pass several years after release, but definitely not on November 19, 2026 when it launches.

Final Thoughts: Act Before April 15

The removal of GTA 5 from Xbox Game Pass marks a significant shift in Rockstar's strategy as the company pivots toward GTA 6's November launch. You still have close to 2 weeks to try the games out and decide whether you want to purchase; some of them are also offering discounts .

According to financial reports, the title has shipped over 215 million units as of late 2025, making it one of the best-selling games in history —and for Game Pass subscribers who've enjoyed it this past year, the decision to purchase or let it go is now front and center.

Action Checklist Before April 15:
  1. ✅ Check if you own GTA 5 or just have Game Pass access
  2. ✅ Decide if you want to purchase at the discounted price
  3. ✅ Complete any in-progress story missions or achievements
  4. ✅ Take screenshots of your GTA Online stats/character for memories
  5. ✅ Browse the new April Game Pass arrivals to find your next game

Whether you choose to purchase GTA 5 at a discount or move on to the excellent lineup of April additions, there's no shortage of gaming experiences on Xbox Game Pass. And with GTA 6 just seven months away, this might be the perfect time to clear your backlog and save your gaming budget for Rockstar's next masterpiece.

title: Mass Effect TV Series: Amazon Demands Script Rewrites
metaTitle: Mass Effect Amazon Series: Rewrites for Non-Gamers Spark Controversy
metaDescription: Amazon's Mass Effect series is on the verge of greenlight, but new boss demands rewrites to appeal to non-gamers. Everything we know about the 2026 production.
excerpt: Amazon MGM Studios' new head Peter Friedlander has reportedly requested script rewrites for the Mass Effect TV series to make it more appealing to non-gamers, sparking debate among fans. The series is on the verge of a series order with filming potentially starting in late 2026.
content:
Mass Effect TV Series: Amazon Demands Script Rewrites for Non-Gamers

Breaking news on the highly anticipated adaptation raises questions about creative direction

Breaking Update: According to The Ankler, Amazon MGM Studios' new head, Peter Friedlander, has demanded that the script be reworked so the adaptation becomes "more appealing to people who do not play video games." The series is reportedly on the verge of receiving a series order.

Table of Contents

  1. Breaking News: Script Rewrites Demanded
  2. Production Timeline and Release Date
  3. Who's Making the Mass Effect Series?
  4. What Story Will the Series Tell?
  5. Fan Reactions and Industry Concerns
  6. The Fallout Blueprint: Hope or Warning?
  7. Mass Effect's Gaming Legacy
  8. What Filipino Gamers Should Expect

Breaking News: Script Rewrites Demanded

The Mass Effect TV adaptation at Amazon Prime Video has hit a controversial bump in the road. According to The Ankler, Amazon MGM Studios' new head, Peter Friedlander, has demanded that the script be reworked so the adaptation becomes "more appealing to people who do not play video games."

This news comes as journalists report that the series is "on the verge of a greenlight," and filming could begin very soon. The timing is crucial—after years of development hell, the Mass Effect series finally seemed ready to move forward, only to face this unexpected creative hurdle.

Who Is Peter Friedlander?

Peter Friedlander, who recently left Netflix as Head of U.S. and Canada Scripted Series, has joined Amazon MGM Studios as the new Head of Global TV. During his Netflix tenure, Friedlander shepherded such shows as Wednesday, Bridgerton, Monster, Ozark, Emily in Paris, The Queen's Gambit, Stranger Things, The Night Agent, 3 Body Problem, Black Mirror and more.

Friedlander officially started at Amazon on October 6, 2025, and has been implementing major changes across the studio's TV division. Under former head Vernon Sanders, Amazon MGM's TV division had been structured around wholly owned series and co-productions. Starting "immediately," Friedlander wrote in a memo to staff Monday, the studio will switch to genre-based teams for both development and current programming: drama and comedy, worldbuilding (i.e., fantasy, sci-fi and other "genre" series), animation and unscripted.

What This Means for the Series

The rewrite request has sparked immediate debate in the gaming community. On the one hand, such a demand from Amazon's leadership is concerning: it is easy to see it as an attempt to strip Mass Effect of its uniqueness and identity, turning the franchise into a standard, toothless space sci-fi story.

However, there's a silver lining that fans are clinging to. The same report notes that the series is "on the verge of a greenlight," suggesting that despite the rewrites, Amazon remains committed to moving forward with production.

Important Context: These rewrites don't necessarily mean the series will abandon its gaming roots. Amazon may simply be ensuring the show is accessible to mainstream audiences while retaining core elements that made Mass Effect a beloved franchise.

Production Timeline and Release Date

Despite the recent rewrite news, the Mass Effect series has a clear production roadmap—assuming it receives the greenlight everyone expects.

When Will Filming Begin?

According to a recent listing in Production Weekly, Amazon MGM Studios is targeting a Q4 2026 start date for production. This means filming would begin sometime between October to December next year.

In all likelihood, based on this schedule, the series will be released around late 2027 to early 2028. Filipino fans should expect to wait approximately two to three years before seeing Commander Shepard's universe come to life on screen.

A Long Journey to the Screen

The Mass Effect adaptation has been in development far longer than most fans realize. Amazon's landing of the television rights for Mass Effect dates back to November 2021, when Deadline first reported that Amazon Studios was nearing a deal to develop a live-action series based on the franchise.

But the journey started even earlier. The tale of a Mass Effect adaptation goes back even further, to 2010, with a totally different studio that had a much bigger vision in mind. Legendary Pictures initially held the film rights and attempted a movie adaptation that never materialized.

Year Milestone
2010 Legendary Pictures acquires film rights
2021 Amazon enters negotiations for TV series
November 2024 Daniel Casey confirmed as writer and executive producer
June 2025 Doug Jung joins as showrunner
November 2025 BioWare confirms new original story set after trilogy
April 2026 Rewrite requests from new Amazon TV head
Q4 2026 Planned filming start date
2027-2028 Projected release window

Who's Making the Mass Effect Series?

Despite the recent turbulence, the Mass Effect series has assembled an impressive creative team with experience in both sci-fi and video game adaptations.

Doug Jung - Showrunner

Doug Jung joining the show as the showrunner and lead writer. As the man who co-wrote 2016's Star Trek Beyond, he certainly has suitable space opera experience. His story contributions to 2018's The Cloverfield Paradox also add to his sci-fi credentials.

Jung's recent work includes serving as showrunner for Apple TV+'s "Chief of War," demonstrating his ability to helm major streaming productions.

Daniel Casey - Writer and Executive Producer

Daniel Casey is set to write and executive produce the adaptation. Casey most recently worked on the screenplay for "F9: The Fast Saga." He is also known for his work on films like the sci-fi drama "Kin" and did rewrites on "10 Cloverfield Lane."

Executive Producers

The production features heavy-hitting executive producers:

  • Mike Gamble - Mass Effect head Mike Gamble will oversee the series , ensuring BioWare maintains creative input
  • Karim Zreik - Previously an executive at the now defunct Marvel Television unit under Jeph Loeb. During his time with Marvel, he served as an executive producer on hit shows like "Daredevil," "Jessica Jones," "Luke Cage," "The Punisher," and "Legion"
  • Avi Arad - Legendary producer with extensive experience in comic book and video game adaptations

For Filipino gamers looking to earn while gaming, check out our guides on how to earn GCash through gaming and free MLBB diamonds.

What Story Will the Mass Effect Series Tell?

One of the biggest questions fans have had is whether the series would retread Commander Shepard's story or forge new ground. We finally have an answer.

An Original Story Set After the Trilogy

Franchise executive producer Mike Gamble stated that the show would tell an original story set after the events of Commander Shepard's original trilogy. This was officially announced in November 2025.

The show will tell a completely new story set after the original trilogy. It will not be a retelling of Commander Shepard's story — because, after all… this is YOUR story, isn't it? This statement directly addresses the challenge of adapting a game series built on player choice.

Why Not Retell Shepard's Story?

The decision to avoid Shepard's story makes perfect sense from a creative standpoint. One major challenge is the franchise's emphasis on player choice, which would make it difficult to create an adaptation that satisfies everyone. Fans have made vastly different decisions during their playthroughs, starting with selecting a male or female Commander Shepard. Additionally, the Mass Effect games have never established a single canonical storyline.

Any show that depicts specific events risks being seen as the official version of the saga, which could alienate parts of the fanbase.

Canon Implications

Importantly, the events of the series will become part of the official Mass Effect canon. This means the show won't just be a side story—it will have implications for the broader Mass Effect universe, potentially including the upcoming Mass Effect 5 video game.

For New Fans: The Mass Effect trilogy follows Commander Shepard's mission to stop the Reapers, an ancient race of sentient machines bent on destroying all organic life. The games are renowned for allowing players to make choices that dramatically affect the story, relationships, and even which characters survive.

Fan Reactions and Industry Concerns

The news about rewrites to appeal to non-gamers has generated polarized reactions across gaming communities, including here in the Philippines where Mass Effect has a dedicated fanbase.

The Concerns

Many fans worry that Amazon's directive could dilute what makes Mass Effect special. It is easy to see it as an attempt to strip Mass Effect of its uniqueness and identity, turning the franchise into a standard, toothless space sci-fi story.

The timing is particularly concerning given that Halo eventually came back as a television project in the 2010s, which took the better part of a decade to get off the ground, before the show finally debuted on Paramount+ in 2022. The series was later cancelled after its poorly received second season in 2024. The Halo series faced significant criticism for deviating from source material and making controversial creative choices.

The Cautious Optimism

However, not all fans are pessimistic. Some point to Amazon's track record and argue the rewrites might actually help the series succeed with broader audiences without sacrificing what makes Mass Effect special.

The fact that the series will be overseen by Mass Effect head Mike Gamble provides some reassurance that BioWare will maintain creative oversight to protect the franchise's integrity.

What Filipino Gamers Are Saying

In Philippine gaming communities, reactions have been mixed. While many Filipino Mass Effect fans are excited to finally see the universe on screen, there's widespread concern about maintaining the series' mature themes, complex moral choices, and the deep lore that made the games special.

Looking for more gaming content? Browse our latest gaming deals and guides for Philippine gamers.

The Fallout Blueprint: Hope or Warning?

When discussing Amazon's approach to video game adaptations, the Fallout series inevitably comes up—and it provides both hope and context for what Mass Effect might become.

Fallout's Successful Approach

Amazon already has experience with a successful adaptation of a gaming universe. The Fallout series managed to tell a new story aimed at the broadest possible audience. At the same time, thanks to its careful treatment of the world, factions, and lore, fans of the game series were satisfied as well.

With the recent success of another live-action video game television series, Fallout, Prime Video is moving ahead with its Mass Effect plans. The Fallout series demonstrated that Amazon can successfully adapt beloved game franchises while appealing to mainstream audiences.

Key Differences

However, Mass Effect and Fallout face different adaptation challenges:

  • Narrative Structure: Fallout games feature standalone stories in a shared universe, making it easier to create original content. Mass Effect has a more interconnected narrative.
  • Protagonist: Fallout successfully avoided showing a canonical "Vault Dweller," while Mass Effect is tackling this by setting the story after Shepard's era.
  • Tone: Fallout's dark humor and retro-futuristic aesthetic are distinct, while Mass Effect's serious space opera tone could be harder to balance for mainstream appeal.

What Amazon Learned

Fallout's success likely informed Friedlander's approach to Mass Effect. The series proved that video game adaptations can succeed on Amazon by:

  1. Respecting the source material's lore and world-building
  2. Creating new stories rather than directly adapting game plots
  3. Maintaining production quality with significant budgets
  4. Making the series accessible to non-gamers without alienating fans

Mass Effect's Gaming Legacy

To understand why fans are so passionate about this adaptation, it's important to recognize Mass Effect's impact on gaming.

Sales and Commercial Success

The Mass Effect franchise has been a commercial powerhouse for EA and BioWare:

  • The original Mass Effect sold 2 million copies. Mass Effect 2 sold 5 million copies. Mass Effect 3 sold 7 million copies. Mass Effect Andromeda sold 5 million copies.
  • Mass Effect 3 was the most commercially successful game of the series: it sold over 800,000 copies in its first 24 hours, and its opening month sales were twice that of its predecessor's, selling over 900,000 copies on the Xbox 360 version, outselling the PlayStation 3 version 4 to 1 and bringing in over $200 million in revenue.
  • According to information found on the LinkedIn profile of Jarrett Lee, former director of marketing and global brand management at EA and BioWare, the Mass Effect franchise had sold more than 25 million copies by 2018.

Critical Acclaim

The first two Mass Effect titles are widely considered to be among the greatest games of all time. Mass Effect 2 in particular is the most critically acclaimed game in the series and garnered numerous game of the year awards following its release. It received over 70 perfect review scores.

Cultural Impact

Tauriq Moosa from The Guardian lauded the Mass Effect franchise as some of the best science fiction ever made, describing its overarching theme of "aspiration and connection in the face of an indifferent cosmos" to be "as cerebral as Star Trek, as hopeful as Asimov and as dramatic as Battlestar Galactica".

Discover more about gaming culture and opportunities with our guide to free Robux in the Philippines.

What Filipino Gamers Should Expect

As we await more news about the Mass Effect series, here's what Philippine fans should keep in mind:

Release Timeline

If everything stays on schedule, expect:

  • Q4 2026: Production begins
  • Mid-to-Late 2027: Possible first trailer or teaser
  • Late 2027 to Early 2028: Series premiere on Amazon Prime Video

The series will be available on Amazon Prime Video, which is accessible in the Philippines. Filipino subscribers will likely get the show on the same day as global release.

What the Rewrites Might Mean

While "appealing to non-gamers" sounds ominous, it could simply mean:

  • Adding more exposition for viewers unfamiliar with the universe
  • Streamlining complex lore elements
  • Focusing on universal themes like heroism, sacrifice, and relationships
  • Making technical concepts more accessible

It doesn't necessarily mean dumbing down the content or removing what makes Mass Effect special.

Staying Informed

To stay updated on the Mass Effect series development:

  1. Follow BioWare's official social media channels
  2. Monitor Amazon Prime Video's announcements
  3. Join Mass Effect fan communities for the latest news and speculation
  4. Keep an eye on gaming news sites for production updates
Pro Tip: If you're new to Mass Effect and want to experience the games before the show arrives, the Mass Effect Legendary Edition (a remastered collection of the original trilogy) is available on multiple platforms and frequently goes on sale.

The Bigger Picture

The Mass Effect series is part of a larger trend of prestige video game adaptations. Following the success of The Last of Us, Fallout, and others, studios are investing heavily in bringing gaming's greatest stories to television.

For Filipino gamers, this represents an exciting era where gaming is finally getting the respect it deserves as a storytelling medium. Whether the Mass Effect adaptation succeeds or fails, it's another step toward gaming's full acceptance in mainstream entertainment.

Explore more gaming opportunities with our Free Fire codes guide to enhance your mobile gaming experience.

Final Thoughts

The news about script rewrites for the Mass Effect series is undoubtedly concerning for fans who've waited years for a faithful adaptation. However, it's important to remember that we're still in the pre-production phase, and changes at this stage are normal.

The fact that the series is reportedly on the verge of a greenlight is positive news—it means Amazon remains committed to the project despite the creative adjustments. With filming potentially starting in late 2026, we're closer than ever to seeing the Mass Effect universe realized on screen.

The involvement of BioWare's Mike Gamble, the talented creative team, and Amazon's proven track record with Fallout all provide reasons for cautious optimism. While the "appeal to non-gamers" directive is worrying, it might result in a series that successfully introduces Mass Effect's rich universe to new audiences while satisfying longtime fans.

As Filipino gamers who've spent countless hours exploring the Citadel, romancing companions, and making impossible choices, we'll be watching this development closely. The Mass Effect universe deserves a adaptation that honors its legacy while bringing Commander Shepard's galaxy to a new generation of fans.

faqs.a: No. BioWare's Mike Gamble confirmed in November 2025 that the series will tell a completely new original story set after the events of Commander Shepard's trilogy. The show will not retell Shepard's story, respecting that it's 'YOUR story' as a player.

title: Starfield PS5 Release April 7: Free Lanes Update Guide
metaTitle: Starfield PS5 Release April 7: Free Lanes Update & Terran Armada DLC
metaDescription: Starfield launches on PS5 April 7, 2026 with the massive Free Lanes update & Terran Armada DLC. Get release times, new features, prices & redemption details.
excerpt: Bethesda's space RPG Starfield finally arrives on PlayStation 5 on April 7, 2026, bringing the biggest free update since launch (Free Lanes) and new story DLC (Terran Armada). This marks the end of Xbox exclusivity and potentially Starfield's Cyberpunk 2077-style redemption arc.
content:
Starfield PS5 Release April 7: Free Lanes Update & Terran Armada DLC Complete Guide

Published April 4, 2026 | Updated for Philippines Gaming Community

Breaking: Starfield launches on PlayStation 5 in just 3 days (April 7, 2026) with the massive Free Lanes update and Terran Armada DLC. Pre-loading starts April 5. File size: 135GB. This guide covers everything Filipino gamers need to know about release times, pricing, new features, and whether this is Starfield's redemption moment.

Table of Contents

  1. Release Date, Times & Pre-Load Details
  2. Free Lanes Update: What's New
  3. Terran Armada DLC Breakdown
  4. PS5-Exclusive Features & Performance
  5. Pricing Guide: Standard vs Premium Edition
  6. Is This Starfield's Cyberpunk Moment?
  7. Complete Gameplay Improvements List
  8. Should You Buy? Verdict for PH Gamers

Release Date, Times & Pre-Load Details

Starfield officially launches on PlayStation 5 on April 7, 2026 , marking the end of its Xbox/PC exclusivity period. For Filipino gamers, here's everything you need to know about timing and preparation:

Philippines Release Time

Region Release Time (April 7) Pre-Load Start
Philippines (PHT) 12:00 AM midnight April 5, 2026
US Pacific (PT) 9:00 AM PDT April 5, 2026
UK (GMT) 5:00 PM BST April 5, 2026

Download Size & Pre-Load Information

The game requires approximately 135 GB on PlayStation 5, with recommendations to have at least 150 GB of free space to account for the Free Lanes day-one patch and Terran Armada DLC installation .

Important for PH Gamers: With the 135GB file size, pre-loading is critical given typical Philippine internet speeds. Start your download on April 5 to ensure you're ready for the April 7 midnight launch. Consider downloading during off-peak hours (2-6 AM) for faster speeds.

At the same time as the PS5 launch, Starfield's biggest free update yet (Free Lanes) and the all-new Terran Armada story DLC will go live across all platforms , meaning Xbox and PC players also get access to this content.

Free Lanes Update: What's New

Described as the game's largest free update since launch, Starfield's Free Lanes update introduces significant improvements, focusing on interplanetary exploration and deep-space gameplay . This addresses one of the biggest complaints from the original 2023 launch.

Cruise Mode: The Game-Changer

Starfield's Free Lanes update is designed for interplanetary exploration, with the first addition being Cruise Mode, where your speed can increase to light-years, making it easier to fly between planets, while letting players move freely around their ship while traveling .

You can now fly freely between planets within a star system without fast-traveling, and you can leave the pilot's seat to decorate your ship, use workbenches, or chat with crew, while an autopilot handles the journey in Cruise Mode .

X-Tech Resource System

X-Tech is a new resource for customizing and upgrading the player's weapons, gear, and ship . This system adds depth to endgame progression:

  • Customize weapon effects by using X-Tech to re-roll legendary effects until you get the one you want, with 5 rerolls available, after which the full list opens up for you to pick the modifier you're looking for
  • Tier 4 legendary effects are now available for weapons, helmets, packs and suits, with the ability to apply a new rank four effect for credits and X-Tech once you have a rank three legendary item
  • Some weapons and gear become "Exotic" when you reach max upgrades, with new Tier 4 legendary effects including Saboteur (damaging robots has a chance to instantly kill them, and robots explode on death)

Quality of Life Improvements

Players can now install an outpost container at each outpost for easier access to resources, while the new Database system pulls in everything the players have learned, including locations, recipes, resources, ingredients, and more .

Additional features include:

  • A Milliewhale outpost pet that can perform tricks, be customized, and more, unlocked by completing the "Housesitting" quest in Anchorpoint
  • New ways to upgrade Starborn Abilities through Quantum Essence without having to start New Game+ and find temples, plus the Quantum Entanglement Device that lets you bring up to 50 favorite inventory items to your new playthrough
  • A new land vehicle called the Moon Jumper, a hover car with enormous boost capacity able to gain serious elevation and well-suited for open-area exploration

Check out our gaming deals page for discounts on PlayStation Network cards to purchase the Premium Edition.

Terran Armada DLC Breakdown

Alongside the release of Free Lanes and the PS5 version, the Terran Armada story expansion launches on the same day, featuring a new questline involving advanced robot armies, a new companion, and NASA-tactical ground-based military gear and weapons including a new multi-gun platform (MGP), available for $9.99 or free for Premium Edition owners .

Story & Gameplay

The Terran Armada has risen, bringing "unity" to the Settled Systems in the form of an army of highly advanced robots and enough firepower to put the galaxy in a chokehold, with players fighting back through the Incursion system, uncovering powerful new tech, exploring with a new Companion, and earning rewards .

New Features in Terran Armada

  • Incursion System: Dynamic combat events triggered by the new Terran Armada faction that can deploy technology disabling your Grav Drive, forcing you to use Cruise Mode to either engage their fleet or navigate around the blockade, with defeating these Incursions being a primary way to earn the new X-Tech resource
  • New Companion: Model G, a small robot found in The Well during Terran Armada that's repairable, assignable to ships, with swappable personality modes and paint colours
  • Pre-Built Outpost: A ready-to-go, fully decorated elevated cabin module to drop on the planet of your choice, though you can make whatever changes you want to the interior once it's built
  • New Ships & Parts: Terran Armada ship pieces available at ship services technicians, with the recommended way being to find a Terran Armada ship you like, commandeer it, register it, and make it your own
Filipino Gamer Tip: At ₱500-550 (approximately $9.99), Terran Armada offers solid value for 8-10 hours of new story content. However, if you're on a budget, the Free Lanes update alone provides massive improvements at zero cost.

PS5-Exclusive Features & Performance

Every firefight and dogfight in Starfield hits harder with the PlayStation 5 DualSense controller, with adaptive triggers changing from weapon to weapon (including starship loadout), the light bar keeping tabs on your health and ship integrity, and the touchpad letting you jump between first- and third-person POV or instantly access your map and hand scanner .

DualSense Integration

  • The controller's lightbar reflects the player character's health levels
  • In-game audio logs and non-local ship intercoms pour through the DualSense controller speaker, immersing you deeper in the action
  • Adaptive triggers, touchpad for POV switching, and map/hand scanner access

PS5 Pro Performance Modes

Starfield has been visually enhanced for the PlayStation 5 Pro, with a Visual mode that runs 4K resolution at 30 fps and a Performance mode that features improved visuals at 60 fps .

Mode Resolution Frame Rate Best For
Visual Mode 4K 30 FPS Cinematic exploration
Performance Mode Enhanced visuals 60 FPS Combat & fast travel

For Filipino gamers considering whether to invest in a PS5 Pro, the Performance mode at 60 FPS makes space combat significantly smoother, especially during the new Incursion battles.

Pricing Guide: Standard vs Premium Edition

The PS5 version of Starfield is cheaper than the launch version on Xbox and PC, priced at $50 on PlayStation, while the Starfield premium edition is $70 on PS5 (the original price at release) and comes with the base game as well as both the Shattered Space expansion and Terran Armada content .

Philippine Pricing Breakdown

Edition US Price PH Estimate Includes
Standard Edition $49.99 ₱2,750-2,990 Base game + Free Lanes update
Premium Edition $69.99 ₱3,850-4,190 Base game + Free Lanes + Shattered Space + Terran Armada
Terran Armada DLC (standalone) $9.99 ₱500-550 Terran Armada DLC only
Best Value for PH Gamers: If you plan to play both DLCs (Shattered Space + Terran Armada), the Premium Edition at ₱3,850-4,190 saves you approximately ₱600-800 compared to buying the Standard Edition and purchasing both DLCs separately.

Looking to earn money for the game? Check out our guide on how to earn GCash playing games to fund your Starfield purchase.

Is This Starfield's Cyberpunk Moment?

The gaming community has been buzzing about whether Starfield can pull off a Cyberpunk 2077-style redemption arc. Here's what the evidence suggests:

The Comparison to Cyberpunk 2.0

According to Windows Central's Jez Corden and content creator Luke Stephens, Starfield is planning a major update in 2026 that may be comparable to Cyberpunk 2077's 2.0 patch, with Bethesda reportedly holding an event behind closed doors showing select individuals what will be included in the update, with improvements specifically aimed at the most common complaints such as loading screens .

One source who is considered a diehard fan of the base game said it's a Cyberpunk 2.0 situation, meanwhile another person who wasn't particularly impressed with the base game said to temper expectations .

What Starfield Had to Fix

Starfield failed to live up to the hype for a lot of gamers, with constant loading screens, repetitive procedurally generated planets, as well as the inability to travel seamlessly between them leaving fans feeling disappointed .

The game's engine didn't gel well with the space travel systems Bethesda envisioned for the game, with the abundance of loading screens between planetary hops marring the experience, and many feeling that the vastness of the play space made finding high-quality hand-crafted content sparse .

What Free Lanes Actually Fixes

Starfield lead creative producer Tim Lamb explained that the system was created in response to one of the most common requests: "Since day one, one of the biggest pieces of feedback we heard was, 'I really want to travel inside a system. I want to see what's out there, in between the planets'" .

Bethesda has heard the feedback regarding the repetitive planetary locations, with this update providing a notable increase in variety for encounters, POIs, and dungeons across planet surfaces, as the developers adjusted the seeding ratio and cooldown of the system that populates them and added new types outright .

The Verdict

While Free Lanes doesn't represent a complete overhaul like Cyberpunk 2.0, it addresses the core complaints that kept players from fully enjoying the game. Including the Free Lanes update in the PS5 launch version is a strategic move allowing Bethesda to present a more feature-complete and polished experience to a new audience, with the PS5 edition poised to be the definitive version of the ambitious RPG .

For more major gaming updates, check out our Roblox news section and Mobile Legends updates.

Complete Gameplay Improvements List

Beyond the headline features, Free Lanes includes dozens of smaller improvements that collectively transform the experience:

Space Exploration

  • Free Lanes introduces a new system allowing players to manually travel between planets within a star system instead of relying entirely on fast travel, using a new cruise-style flight mode with the chance to encounter random events like derelict ships, hostile encounters, and other discoveries
  • A new unique encounter called Interdiction can interrupt Cruise Mode
  • Increased frequency of space encounters
  • New points of interest in deep space

New Game+ Enhancements

New Game+ changes include the Quantum Entanglement Device and Power Upgrades, which let you store and carry up to 50 items for a new playthrough and rank up Starborn abilities directly without revisiting temples or starting a new cycle .

Outpost & Customization

  • Outpost container system for resource management
  • New decorative items like faction-themed skins for workbenches and adorable little animals and habitats for them
  • Database system for tracking all discovered content
  • Pet system (Milliewhale)

Combat & Progression

  • Tier 4 legendary weapon effects
  • X-Tech upgrade system
  • Legendary effect re-rolling
  • Exotic weapon tier at max upgrades

These improvements combine to create what Bethesda describes as the largest overhaul the game has received since launch, removing the barriers from space exploration while introducing new quests, enemies, mechanics, and rewards .

Should You Buy? Verdict for PH Gamers

After analyzing all the new content, here's our honest recommendation for Filipino gamers:

Buy the Standard Edition If:

  • You enjoyed Skyrim or Fallout 4 and want space exploration
  • You have 100+ hours available for a deep RPG
  • You're okay with slower-paced gameplay focused on exploration
  • You want to experience the Free Lanes improvements without DLC commitment
  • Budget is ₱2,750-2,990 (roughly the price of 3-4 months of Game Pass)

Buy the Premium Edition If:

  • You're a completionist who wants all content
  • You enjoyed the previous Bethesda RPGs' DLCs
  • You want the best value long-term (saves ₱600-800)
  • Budget allows for ₱3,850-4,190

Wait for a Sale If:

  • You bounced off the game during the Xbox/PC launch
  • You prefer fast-paced action over exploration
  • Your internet speed makes the 135GB download painful
  • You want to see PS5-specific reviews first

Performance Considerations for PH Gamers

Internet Requirement: While Starfield is single-player and can be played offline after download, you will need an internet connection to download the day-one Free Lanes update, access the Creations modding menu, and verify any digital DLC like Terran Armada . Budget 2-3 days for download on typical Philippine internet speeds (10-25 Mbps).

Final Recommendation

7.5/10 - Recommended with reservations. The Free Lanes update addresses the biggest launch complaints and makes this the definitive version of Starfield. At ₱2,750-2,990, it offers good value for RPG fans, though it's still a slower-paced experience than typical action games popular in the Philippines like Free Fire or Mobile Legends.

For the best experience, we recommend the Standard Edition first. If you fall in love with the game, grab Terran Armada during a future sale.

Stay Updated on the Latest Gaming News

Starfield's PS5 launch represents one of the biggest gaming releases of April 2026, and we'll continue covering updates, guides, and deals. Bookmark smartly.sale for daily gaming news, free rewards guides for Roblox, Mobile Legends, and Free Fire, plus exclusive gaming deals for Filipino players.

Have you pre-ordered Starfield for PS5? Planning to grab the Standard or Premium Edition? Share your thoughts in the comments below and join our community of Filipino gamers exploring the Settled Systems together!

  • Starfield PS5 Announcement - PlayStation Blog

faqs.q: What time does Starfield release on PS5 in the Philippines?
faqs.a: Starfield launches on PS5 at 12:00 AM midnight Philippine Time (PHT) on April 7, 2026. Pre-loading starts on April 5, 2026, allowing you to download the 135GB game file ahead of launch.

faqs.q: Is the Free Lanes update free for all Starfield players?
faqs.a: Yes, the Free Lanes update is completely free for all Starfield players across PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC. It includes cruise mode, X-Tech upgrades, new space encounters, quality of life improvements, and much more at no additional cost.
